---
title: "PEPP2 - results"
author: "Olivier Percie du Sert"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
# Setup 
```{r setup, include = FALSE} 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE)
options(scipen = 999)
options(digits = 5)
```

```{r packages} 
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(glue)
library(labelled)
library(metafor)
library(flextable)
library(vtable)
library(gtsummary)
library(kableExtra)
library(DataEditR)
library(webshot)
library(patchwork)
library(officer)
library(circlize)

source("~/Desktop/LGM/R/LGMMs/var_to_lbl.R")
```

```{r Results} 
rm(list = ls())
ws_res <- list.files(
  file.path(getwd(), "Results"),
  full.names = TRUE) %>%
  file.info() %>%
  filter(isdir == FALSE) %>%
  slice_max(mtime) %>% # get the most updated workspace
  rownames()

  load(ws_res)
```

```{r Outcome} 
ws <- c("SAPS", "SANS", "SOFAS") %>%
  map_chr(\(x)
  file.path(getwd(), x, "689") %>%
    list.files(full.names = TRUE) %>%
    file.info() %>%
    filter(isdir == FALSE) %>%
    slice_max(mtime) %>% # get the most updated workspace
    rownames())

ws <- list.files("/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/GitHub/PEPP_private/PEPP2/Rproj", full.names = TRUE) %>%
  file.info() %>%
  filter(isdir == FALSE) %>%
  slice_max(mtime) %>% # get the most updated workspace
  rownames() %>% 
  c(ws)

env <- map(1:4, new.env) %>%
  set_names(c("PEPP2.env", "SAPS.env", "SANS.env", "SOFAS.env"))
map2(ws, env, \(x, y) load(x, envir = y))
list2env(env, globalenv())

source("/Users/olivierpercie/Desktop/LGM/R/LGMMs/var_to_lbl.R")
```

```{r vars of interest} 
dir <- "/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1.PEPP2/Manuscripts/Trajectories"

## Sociodemographics
SD_num <- c('ageentry', 'FIQ', 'holltotp', 'EDUC_num')
SD_cat <- c('gender', 'Vmin', 'NEET', 'INDPT', 'REL')
SD <- c('DOB', SD_num, SD_cat)

## Clinical information
CHRONO <- c('date_pr','dt2stpsy', 'onset', 'datecont', 'doe', 'prevTX_dur', 'prevAP_dur')
CLIN_num <- c('ageonset', 'duponset', 'dui', 'conv')
CLIN_cat <-c('prev_EP', 'evercont', 'ever_ap', 'txiscm', 'mode', 'CAYRconv', 'ip_op', 'referral', 'Txsitn', 'transfR') #'inRCT', 'RCTgroup'
CLIN <- c(CHRONO, CLIN_num, CLIN_cat)

## Diagnosis
DXII <- paste0('secdx', c(1, 3:6))
DXIIpc <- paste0('secdx', c(1, 3:6), 'pc')
DX <- c('dx_0', 'dx_b2', 'dx_1year', 'dx2', DXII, DXIIpc, 'SUD')

## Cognition
COGSTATE <- c('va_z', 'vism_z', 'verbm_z', 'wm_z', 'sop_z', 'ef_z', 'sc_z')
COG <- c('Battery', COGSTATE)

## Functioning
PAS <- c('PAS_c', 'PAS_ea', 'PAS_la', 'PAS_a', 'PAS_tot2', 'PAS_tot3', 'PAS_tot4')
FUNC_cat <- c('vismin', 'EDUC_cat', 'newwork', 'othwork', 'newliving', 'othliving', 'marital')
EDUC <- paste('EDUC', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
WRK1 <- paste('WRK1', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
HOUS1 <- paste('HOUS1', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
HOUS2 <- paste('HOUS2', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
SOFAS <- paste('SOFAS', c(0, 12, 24), sep = '_')
FUNC <- c(PAS, FUNC_cat, 'Years_of_education', EDUC, WRK1, HOUS1, HOUS2, SOFAS)

## Psychopathology
SAPS <- paste('SAPS', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
SANS <- paste('SANS', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
HAS <- paste('HAS', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
CDS <- paste('CDS', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
YMRS <- paste('YMRS', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')

## Insight 
SUMD1 <- paste('SUMD1', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
SUMD2 <- paste('SUMD2', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
SUMD3 <- paste('SUMD3', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
SUMD <- c(SUMD1, SUMD2, SUMD3)

## Suicide
SCD <- paste('cd8', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')

## Summary
SX_0 <- paste(c('SAPS', 'SANS', 'HAS', 'CDS', 'cd8', 'YMRS','SUMD1'), '0', sep = '_')
SX_24 <- paste(c('SAPS', 'SANS', 'HAS', 'CDS', 'cd8', 'YMRS','SUMD1'), '24', sep = '_')
SX <- c(SAPS, SANS, HAS, CDS, SCD, YMRS, SUMD)

## Remission & Recovery
PSR <- paste('PSR', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
NSR <- paste('NSR', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
JSR <- paste('JSR', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
SR_0 <- paste(c('PSR', 'NSR'), '0', sep = '_')
SR_t <- paste(c('PSR', 'NSR', 'JSR'), 't', sep = '_')
SR_1st <- paste(c('PSR', 'NSR', 'JSR'), '1st', sep = '_')
SR_by3 <- paste(c('PSR', 'NSR', 'JSR'), 'by3', sep = '_')
SR_at3 <- paste(c('PSR', 'NSR', 'JSR'), 'at3', sep = '_')
SR_at6 <- paste(c('PSR', 'NSR', 'JSR'), 'at6', sep = '_')
SR_24 <- paste(c('PSR', 'NSR', 'JSR'), '24', sep = '_')
SR_24C <- paste(c('PSR', 'NSR', 'JSR'), '24C', sep = '_')
RSWG <- c('PSR', 'NSR', 'JSR', 'FR', 'RECOV')
SR_cat <- c(PSR, NSR, JSR, SR_by3, SR_at3, SR_at6, RSWG)
SR <- c(SR_cat, SR_t, SR_1st, SR_24C)

## Medication
adh <- paste('comp', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
ord <- paste0('txm', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), 'co')
CPZ <- paste('CPZ', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
CPZw <- paste('CPZw', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24), sep = '_')
RX_0 <- c('comp_0', 'txm0co', 'CPZw_0')
RX_24 <- c('comp_24', 'txm24co', 'CPZw_24')
RX <-  c(ord, adh, CPZ)
# AP_yn <- starts_with('anti')
# AP_type <- starts_with('atype')

## Trajectory 
# C <- c('C_SOFAS', 'C_SAPS', 'C_SANS')
# CP <- c('CP1_SOFAS', 'CP2_SOFAS', 'CP1_SAPS', 'CP2_SAPS', 'CP1_SANS', 'CP2_SANS', 'CP3_SANS')

## Miscellaneous
# t <- paste0('t', c(0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24))
# items <- sap1_0:umd_6b_24

## Categorical variables to recode as factors
cat <- c(SD_cat, WRK1, HOUS1, HOUS2, CLIN_cat, FUNC_cat, DX, SR_cat, ord)

### Variable label for descriptive tables
lbl_R3STEP <- list(
  ageentry ~ 'Age',
  gender ~ 'Sex',
  Vmin ~ 'Ethnicity',
  FIQ ~ 'IQ',
  EDUC_num ~ 'Education (years)',
  NEET ~ 'Employment',
  INDPT ~ 'Housing',
  REL ~ 'Relationship',
  holltotp ~ 'SES',
  PAS_tot2 ~ 'PAS',
  ageonset ~ 'Age of onset',
  duponset ~ 'DUP (days)',
  mode ~ 'Mode of onset',
  ip_op ~ 'Hospitalization',
  dx_b2 ~ 'Diagnosis',
  CPZ_0 ~ 'CPZeq',
  comp_0 ~ 'Adherence (%)',
  SOFAS_0 ~ 'SOFAS',
  SAPS_0 ~ 'SAPS',
  SANS_0 ~ 'SANS',
  HAS_0 ~ 'HAS',
  CDS_0 ~ 'CDS',
  SUMD1_0 ~ 'SUMD',
  SUD ~ 'SUD',
  # YMRS_0 ~ 'YMRS',
  va_z ~ 'Visual attention', 
  vism_z ~ 'Visual memory',
  verbm_z ~ 'Verbal memory',
  wm_z ~ 'Working memory',
  sop_z ~ 'Speed of processing',
  ef_z ~ 'Executive functioning',
  sc_z ~ 'Social cognition',
  RESP50_SAPS ~ 'Early reponse (PS)',
  RESP50_SANS ~ 'Early reponse (NS)',
  RESP50_tot ~ 'Early reponse (total)'
  # PSR_1st ~ 'Time to response (PS)',
  # NSR_1st ~ 'Time to response (NS)',
  # JSR_1st ~ 'Time to response (joint)',
  # JSR_by3 ~ 'Early response (joint)',
  # JSR_at3 ~ 'Early clinical remission (3mth)',
  # JSR_at6 ~ 'Early clinical remission (6mth)'
  )

lbl_D3STEP <- list(
  CPZ_24 ~ "CPZeq",
  comp_24 ~ "Adherence",
  SOFAS_24 ~ "SOFAS",
  SAPS_24 ~  "SAPS", 
  SANS_24 ~ "SANS",
  HAS_24 ~  "HAS",
  CDS_24 ~  "CDS",
  SUMD1_24 ~ "SUMD",
  PSR ~ "Remission of positive symptoms",
  NSR ~ "Remission of negative symptoms",
  JSR ~ "Clinical remission",
  FR ~ "Functional remission",
  RECOV ~ "Recovery")
```

<!-- To add: R3STEP, Missing data, Assumptions -->

# Analyses 
## Sample 
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/Sample.png)

## Trajectory analyses
Primary outcomes:\
- SOFAS | 0, 12, 24 months\
- SAPS | 0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24-month\
- SANS | 0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24-month\

### Models
#### GCM
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/GCM.png)

$$Y_{it} = \pi_{0i} + \pi_{1i}t + \varepsilon_{it} $$\
$\pi_{0i} = \mu_{00} + \zeta_{0i}$ (intercept)\
$\pi_{1i} = \mu_{10} + \zeta_{1i}$ (slope)\
\

**Assumptions:**\
- class = $C_{i=1}$\
- growth factors variance $\zeta_{ji} \text{ ~ } N(0, \Psi_{jj}) \text{, } j = 0, 1$ <span style="color:red">= freely estimated</span>\
- residual variance $\varepsilon_{it} \text{ ~ } N(0, \sigma_t^2)$ <span style="color:red"> = freely estimated across $t$</span>\
\
\

#### GBTM
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/GBTM.png)

$$Y_{it}^k = \pi_{0i}^k + \pi_{1i}^kt + \varepsilon_{i}$$\
$\pi_{0i}^k = \mu_{00}^k + \zeta_{0i}$ (intercept)\
$\pi_{1i}^k = \mu_{10}^k + \zeta_{1i}$ (slope)\

**Assumptions:**\
- class = $C_{i=1:6}$\
- growth factors variance $\zeta_{ji} \text{, } j = 0, 1$ <span style="color:red">= 0</span>\
- residual variance $\varepsilon_{i} \text{ ~ } N(0, \sigma^2)$ <span style="color:red">= fixed across $t$ & $C_{i=1:k}$</span>\
\
\

#### LCGA 
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/LCGA.png)

$$Y_{it}^k = \pi_{0i}^k + \pi_{1i}^kt + \varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)}$$\
$\pi_{0i}^k = \mu_{00}^k + \zeta_{0i}$ (intercept)\
$\pi_{1i}^k = \mu_{10}^k + \zeta_{1i}$ (slope)\
\
**Assumptions:**\
- class = $C_{i=k}$\
- growth factors variance $\zeta_{ji}\text{, } j = 0, 1$ <span style="color:red">= 0</span>\
- residual variance $\varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)} \text{ ~ } N(0, \sigma_{(k)(t)}^2)$ <span style="color:red">= relaxed across $C_{i=k}$, across $t$,  across $t$ & $C_{i=k}$</span>\
\
\

#### GMM
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/GMM.png)

##### GMMi (class-invariant) 
$$Y_{it}^k = \pi_{0i}^k + \pi_{1i}^kt + \varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)}$$\
$\pi_{0i}^k = \mu_{00}^k + \zeta_{0i}$ (intercept)\
$\pi_{1i} = \mu_{10}^k + \zeta_{1i}$ (slope)\
\
**Assumptions:**\
- class = $C_{i=k}$\
- growth factors variance $\zeta_{ji} \text{ ~ } N(0, \Psi_{jj}) \text{, } j = 0, 1$ <span style="color:red"> = relaxed stepwise</span>\
- residual variance $\varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)} \text{ ~ } N(0, \sigma_{((k)(t))}^2)$ <span style="color:red"> = fixed across $t$ & $C_{i=k}$, relaxed across $C_{i=k}$, across $t$, across $t$ & $C_{i=k}$</span>\
\
\

##### GMMv (class-variant)\ 
$$Y_{it}^k = \pi_{0i}^k + \pi_{1i}^kt + \varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)}$$\
$\pi_{0i}^k = \mu_{00}^k + \zeta_{0i}^k$ (intercept)\
$\pi_{1i}^k = \mu_{10}^k + \zeta_{1i}^k$ (slope)\
\
**Assumptions:**\
- class = $C_{i=k}$\
- growth factors variance $\zeta_{ji}^k \text{ ~ } N(0, \Psi_{jj}^k) \text{, } j = 0, 1$ <span style="color:red"> = relaxed stepwise across $C_{i=k}$</span>\
- residual variance $\varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)} \text{ ~ } N(0, \sigma_{((k)(t))}^2)$ <span style="color:red"> = fixed across $t$ & $C_{i=k}$, relaxed across $C_{i=k}$, across $t$, across $t$ & $C_{i=k}$</span>\

### Model selection strategy
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/LGMMs.png)

Missing data: FIML

## Regression analyses
**Manual 3-step approach:**\
- Estimate the unconditional (covariates excluded) LGM model (class enumeration, optimal model selection)\
- Extract misclassification error rates (logit)\
- Estimate the conditional (covariates included) LGM model using class variables and logits\

The three-step approach preserves the class classification from the unconditional LGM and allows for the estimation of the effects of covariates after taking into account class uncertainty rates.\

![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/Regression models.png)
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/TVCreg.png)

Missing data: FIML\
$\alpha$: Bonferroni correction\

### Multinomial logistic regressions: 
$$P(C_i = k |X_i) = \frac{e^{(b_{k0} +b_{k1}X_i)}}{\sum_{s=1}^K e^{(b_{s0} +b_{s1}X_i)}}$$

   |
---|-------------------------------------------------------------------
$Y$| **Class membership:** $C_{i=k}$
$X$| **Sociodemographics:** age, education, FIQ, SES, onset, DUP, PAS\
     **Baseline predictors:** `r paste(c('SAPS', 'SANS', 'SOFAS', 'HAS', 'CDS', 'YMRS'), '0', sep = '_')`

### Mixture regressions: 
$$\pi_{0i}^{(k)} = \mu_{00}^{(k)} + \gamma_{01}^{(k)}X_i + \zeta_{_{0i}}^{(k)}$$
$$\pi_{1i}^{(k)} = \mu_{10}^{(k)} + \gamma_{11}^{(k)}X_i + \zeta_{_{1i}}^{(k)}$$
   
   | 
---|-----------------------------------------------------------
$Y$| **Growth factors** $\pi_{0i}^{(k)}$ (intercept), $\pi_{1i}^{(k)}(slope)$\
**Primary outcome:** SOFAS, SAPS, SANS
$X$| **Time-varying covariates:** SOFAS, SAPS, SANS, CDA, HAS, YMRS

<!-- ### Multiple linear regressions -->
<!-- $$ -->
<!-- Y_i=(b_0 + b_1X_1 + b_2X_2 + ... + b_nX_{ni}) + \varepsilon_i -->
<!-- $$ -->
<!-- $Y$: **Primary outcome** (SOFAS, SAPS, SANS)\ -->
<!-- $X$: **Time-varying covariates** (SOFAS, SAPS, SANS, CDA, HAS, YMRS)\ -->

### Linear regressions: 
$$
Y_i=(b_0 + b_1C_{i=k}) + \varepsilon_i
$$
   
   
   | 
---|-----------------------------------------------
$Y$| **Distal outcomes:** `r paste(c('SAPS', 'SANS', 'SOFAS', 'HAS', 'CDS', 'YMRS'), '24', sep = '_')`, remission ( -early, -endpoint, -cumulative)\
**variable to add/consider:** clozapine-use, recovery, mortality, suicide, self-harm
$X$| **Class membership:** $C_{i=k}$

## Sensitivity analyses: 
- individually varying timescores\
- intent-to-treat analysis\

# Results 
## SOFAS 
```{r}
pluck(env, "SOFAS.env", "plot")
```

Quadratic GBTM\
```{r}
pluck(env, "SOFAS.env", "FINAL_fit") %>%
  select("NLatentClasses", starts_with(c("count", "proportion"))) %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Predictors of class membership 
```{r} 
SOFAS_R3SETP %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

<!-- ### Time-varying predictors of primary outome -->
```{r, eval = FALSE} 
pluck(env, "SOFAS.env", "TVCreg_stdyx") %>%
  filter(str_detect(param, "^PSR", negate = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(pval < (0.05 / length(env$SOFAS.env$TVCreg_models))) %>%
  select(-warnings, -errors, -sig) %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Distal outcomes of latent classes 
```{r}
SOFAS_D3STEP %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```


## SAPS 
```{r}
pluck(env, "SAPS.env", "plot")
```


Cubic class-variant GMM\
```{r}
pluck(env, "SAPS.env", "FINAL_fit") %>%
  select(n, starts_with(c("count", "proportion"))) %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Predictors of class membership
```{r}
SAPS_R3STEP %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

<!-- ### Time-varying predictors of primary outome -->
```{r, eval = FALSE}
pluck(env, "SAPS.env", "TVCreg_stdyx") %>%
  filter(str_detect(param, "^(NSR|CDS)", negate = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(pval < (0.05 / length(env$SAPS.env$TVCreg_models))) %>%
  select(-warnings, -errors, -sig) %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Time-varying predictors of growth factors wihtin latent classes
```{r}
SAPS_MixREG %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Distal outcomes of latent classes
```{r}
SAPS_D3STEP %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

## SANS 
```{r}
pluck(env, "SANS.env", "plot")
```

Cubic ($C_1$) / linear($C_2$, $C_3$) class-variant GMM\
```{r}
pluck(env, "SANS.env", "FINAL_fit") %>%
  select(n, starts_with(c("count", "proportion"))) %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Predictors of class membership 
```{r}
SANS_R3STEP %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

<!-- ### Time-varying predictors of primary outome -->
```{r, eval = FALSE}
SANS_TVCreg %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Time-varying predictors of growth factors wihtin latent classes
```{r}
SANS_MixREG %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Distal outcomes of latent classes
```{r}
SANS_D3STEP %>%
  knitr::kable(format = "html", digits = c(2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 3), align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```


# Manuscript 
## Table 1. Descriptives stats 
```{r} 
desc_tbl <- pluck(env, "PEPP2.env", "desc_tbl")

set_flextable_defaults(font.family = "Times New Roman", font.size = 11)

desc_tbl %>%
  as_flex_table() %>% 
  set_caption(caption = as_paragraph(as_b("Table 1. "), "Baseline sociodemographic, functional, and clinical characteristics of PEPP-Montreal cohort (N = 689)."), align_with_table = FALSE, fp_p = fp_par(text.align = "left")) %>%
  add_footer_lines(values = "CDS: Calgary depression scale, CPZeq: Chlorpromazine equivalent, DUP: Duration of untreated psychosis, HAS: Hamilton anxiety scale, NEET: Not in employment, education or training, PAS: Premorbid adjustment scale, SANS: Scale for the assessment of negative symptoms, SAPS: Scale for the assessment of positive symptoms, SES: Socioeconomic status, SOFAS: Social occupational functioning scale, SUD: Substance use disorder, SSD: Schizophrenia spectrum disorder, SUMD: Scale to assess awareness in mental disorder, YMRS: Young mania rating scale.") %>% 
  width(width = 3) %>%
  line_spacing(space = 0.30) %>% 
  # font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") %>%
  save_as_docx(path = file.path(dir, "Table1_SD.docx"))
```

## Supplementary Table 4, 6. Descritpives stats by traj 
```{r} 
  traj_df <- env %>%
  tail(-1) %>%
  map2(c("SAPS_df", "SANS_df", "SOFAS_df"), \(env, df) pluck(env, df))
  # map(\(x) mutate(x, across(where(is.factor), ~ fct_na_value_to_level(., level = 'missing')))) %>%
  # reduce(full_join, by = 'pin', suffix = c('', '.y')) %>% #use full_join to keep all observations
  # select(-ends_with('.y'))

desc_R3STEP <- traj_df %>%
  map2(c("C_SAPS", "C_SANS", "C_SOFAS"), \(df, C)
  tbl_summary(df,
    include = all_of(env$SAPS.env$cov_R3STEP),
    by = C,
    label = lbl_R3STEP,
    type = list(c(ends_with("1st"), starts_with("comp")) ~ "continuous"),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)", 
      duponset ~ "{median} ({sd})"
    ),
    digits = list(
      all_continuous() ~ 1,
      all_categorical() ~ 0
    ),
    missing = "no"
  ))

desc_D3STEP <- traj_df %>%
  map2(c("C_SAPS", "C_SANS", "C_SOFAS"), \(df, C)
  tbl_summary(df,
    include = all_of(env$SAPS.env$cov_D3STEP),
    by = C,
    label = lbl_D3STEP,
    type = list(c(ends_with("1st"), starts_with("comp")) ~ "continuous"),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    digits = list(
      all_continuous() ~ 1,
      all_categorical() ~ 0
    ),
    # percent = 'row',
    missing = "no"
  ))

desc_merged <- list(desc_R3STEP, desc_D3STEP) %>% 
  # map_depth(2,~ add_p(.x, pvalue_fun = ~ style_pvalue(.x, digits = 3))) %>%
  # map_depth(2, ~ bold_p(.x)) %>%
  map_depth(2, ~ add_n(.x)) %>% 
  map_depth(2, ~ italicize_levels(.x)) %>% 
  map(~ tbl_merge(.x, tab_spanner = c("SAPS", "SANS", "SOFAS")))
  # tbl_stack(group_header = c('Baseline predictors','Distal outcomes')) 

show_header_names(desc_merged[[1]])
  
traj_desc <- desc_merged %>%
# map(~ modify_table_body(.x, ~ filter(.x, label != 'missing'))) %>% 
map(~ modify_header(.x, 
    stat_1_1 = "**Fluctuating** ({n}; {style_percent(p)}%)",
    stat_2_1 = "**Stable-low** ({n}; {style_percent(p)}%)",
    stat_1_2 = "**Fluctuating** ({n}; {style_percent(p)}%)",
    stat_2_2 = "**Decreasing** ({n}; {style_percent(p)}%)",
    stat_3_2 = "**Stable-high** ({n}; {style_percent(p)}%)", 
    stat_1_3 = "**Stable-moderate** ({n}; {style_percent(p)}%)",
    stat_2_3 = "**Increasing** ({n}; {style_percent(p)}%)")) %>% 
map(~ modify_caption(.x, "Supplementary Table 12. Baseline and Distal sociodemographic, functional and clinical characteristics across trajectories")) 

  
set_flextable_defaults(font.family = "Times New Roman", font.size = 7, big.mark = "", part = 'all')

traj_desc <- map(traj_desc, 
  ~ as_flex_table(.x) %>% 
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 1) %>% 
  width(width = 3.5, unit = "cm") %>%
  autofit(add_w = 0, add_h = 0) %>%
  flextable::fontsize(size = 7, part = 'all') %>%
  line_spacing(space = 0) %>%
  # height_all(height = 0.3, part = "body", unit = "cm") %>% 
  # width(width = 1, j = c('n_1', 'n_2', 'n_3'), unit = "cm"))
  # width(width = 1.75, j = c('p.value_1', 'p.value_2', 'p.value_3'), unit = "cm") %>% 
  # width(width = 10, j = 1, unit = "cm") %>%
  set_caption(caption = as_paragraph(as_b("Supplementary Table 45. "), "Baseline and Distal sociodemographic, functional and clinical characteristics across trajectories."), align_with_table = FALSE, fp_p = fp_par(text.align = "left")) %>%
  add_footer_lines(values = "CDS: Calgary depression scale, CPZeq: Chlorpromazine equivalent, DUP: Duration of untreated psychosis, HAS: Hamilton anxiety scale, NEET: Not in employment, education or training, NS: Negative symptoms, PAS: Premorbid adjustment scale, PS: Positive symptoms, SANS: Scale for the assessment of negative symptoms, SAPS: Scale for the assessment of positive symptoms, SES: Socioeconomic status, SOFAS: Social occupational functioning scale, SUD: Substance use disorder, SSD: Schizophrenia spectrum disorder, SUMD: Scale to assess awareness in mental disorder, YMRS: Young mania rating scale."))

iwalk(traj_desc, \(x, idx) save_as_docx(x, path = glue(dir, "SupplementaryTable{idx}_SD_traj.docx", .sep = "/"),
                                           pr_section = prop_section(page_size = page_size(orient = "portrait"),
                                                                     type = "continuous",
                                                                     page_margins = page_mar(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5))))

```

## Table 2. Models summary 
### Summary of optimal models 
```{r} 
summary_tbl <- map_dfr(env, ~ pluck(.x, "FINAL_fit")) %>%
  mutate(Outcome = c("SAPS", "SANS", "SOFAS")) %>%
  rename(N = Observations) %>%
  rename("Latent classes" = NLatentClasses) %>%
  mutate(Model = c("GMM (class-variant)", "GMM (class-invariant)", "GBTM")) %>%
  mutate(Polynomial = c("cubic", "cubic (1, 2); linear (3)", "quadratic")) %>%
  mutate("Random effect" = c("intercept & linear slope", "intercept & linear slope", "0")) %>%
  mutate(Residuals = c("free across time & classes", "free across classes", "fix across time & classes")) %>%
  # mutate("aLMR pval" = round(T11_LMR_PValue, 3)) %>%
  mutate("aLMR pval" = "< 0.001") %>%
  mutate(across(c(where(is.numeric), -T11_LMR_PValue), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  mutate("Class 1" = glue("{count_1} ({round(proportion_1, 0)}%)")) %>%
  mutate("Class 2" = glue("{count_2} ({round(proportion_2, 0)}%)")) %>%
  mutate("Class 3" = case_when(!is.na(count_3) ~ glue("{count_3} ({round(proportion_3, 0)}%)"))) %>%
  select("Outcome", "N", "Latent classes", "Model", "Parameters", "Polynomial", "Random effect", "Residuals", "BIC", "aLMR pval",
starts_with("Class"), "Entropy")
  # data_edit(code = TRUE, viewer = "dialog")

set_flextable_defaults(font.family = "Times New Roman", font.size = 7, big.mark = "")

summary_tbl %>% 
  flextable() %>% 
  set_caption(caption = as_paragraph(as_b("Table 2. "), "Summary of optimal models."), align_with_table = FALSE, 
              fp_p = fp_par(text.align = "left")) %>% 
  padding(padding = 0, part = "all") %>% 
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 1) %>% 
  bold(part = 'header') %>% 
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>% 
  add_footer_lines(values = "aLMR: Adjusted Lo-Mendell-Rubin likelihood ratio test, BIC: Baeysian information criterion, GBTM: Group-based trajectory model, GMM: Growth mixture model, SANS: Scale for the assessment of negative symptoms, SAPS: Scale for the assessment of positive symptoms, SOFAS: Social occupational functioning scale.") %>% 
  autofit(add_w = 0, add_h = 0) %>%
  save_as_docx(path = file.path(dir, "Table2_summary.docx"),
               pr_section = prop_section(page_size = page_size(orient = "portrait"),
                                         type = "continuous",
                                         page_margins = page_mar(1, 1, 0.5, 0.5)))
```

## Supplementary Tables 1, 2, 3. Summary of all models 
```{r}
all_tbl <- map(env[2:4], \(x) map(c("GCM_fit", "GBTM_fit", "LCGA_fit", "GMMci_fit", "GMMcv_fit"), \(y) pluck(x, y))) %>% 
  map_depth(1, \(x) modify_if(x, \(x) is.data.frame(x) == FALSE, \(x) tail(x, -1))) %>% 
  map_depth(1, \(x) modify_if(x, \(x) is.data.frame(x) == FALSE, \(x) flatten(x))) %>% 
  map_depth(2, \(x) as.data.frame(x)) %>% 
  map(\(x) reduce(x, merge, all = TRUE)) %>% 
  map(\(x) rename(x, N = Observations)) %>% 
  map(\(x) rename(x, "Latent classes" = NLatentClasses)) %>%
  map(\(x) mutate(x, Model = str_split_i(Title, "_", 1))) %>% 
  map(\(x) mutate(x, Model = str_remove_all(Model, "[\\d\\s]"))) %>% 
  map(\(x) mutate(x, Model = case_when(
    str_detect(Title, "CI") ~ paste(Model, "(class-invariant)"),
    str_detect(Title, "CV") ~ paste(Model, "(class-variant)"), 
    .default = Model
  ))) %>% 
  map(\(x) mutate(x, Polynomial = case_when(
    str_detect(Title, "P3|cub") ~ "cubic",
    str_detect(Title, "P2|q") ~ "quadratic",
    str_detect(Title, "P1|l") ~ "linear"))) %>% 
  map(\(x) mutate(x, Random_effect = case_when(
    str_detect(Title, "s@0") ~ "intercept",
    str_detect(Title, "q@0") ~ "intercept, linear",
    str_detect(Title, "cub@0") ~ "intercept, linear, quadratic",
    Model == "GCM" ~ Polynomial,
    Model == "GBTM" ~ "0",
    Model == "LCGA" ~ "0", 
    str_detect(Title, "cub(?!@)") ~ "intercept, linear, quadratic, cubic",
    str_detect(Title, "q(?!@)") ~ "intercept, linear, quadratic"))) %>% 
  map(\(x) mutate(x, Residuals = case_when(
    str_detect(Title, "CT$|LCGA3") ~ "free across time & classes",
    str_detect(Title, "C$|LCGA1") ~ "free across classes",
    str_detect(Title, "T$|LCGA2") ~ "free across time",
    str_detect(Title, "FIX$") ~ "fix across time & classes", 
    Model == "GCM" ~ "free across time",
    Model == "GBTM" ~ "fix across time & classes"))) %>% 
  map(\(x) mutate(x, "Class 1" = case_when(!is.na(count_1) ~ glue("{count_1} ({round(proportion_1, 0)}%)")))) %>%
  map(\(x) mutate(x, "Class 2" = case_when(!is.na(count_2) ~ glue("{count_2} ({round(proportion_2, 0)}%)")))) %>%
  map(\(x) mutate(x, "Class 3" = case_when(!is.na(count_3) ~ glue("{count_3} ({round(proportion_3, 0)}%)")))) %>%
  map(\(x) mutate(x, "Class 4" = case_when(!is.na(count_4) ~ glue("{count_4} ({round(proportion_4, 0)}%)")))) %>%
  map(\(x) mutate(x, "Class 5" = case_when(!is.na(count_5) ~ glue("{count_5} ({round(proportion_5, 0)}%)")))) %>%
  map(\(x) mutate(x, "Class 6" = case_when(!is.na(count_6) ~ glue("{count_6} ({round(proportion_6, 0)}%)")))) %>% 
  map(\(x) mutate(x, across(c(where(is.numeric), -T11_LMR_PValue), ~ round(.x, 2)))) %>%
  map(\(x) mutate(x, "aLMR pval" = round(T11_LMR_PValue, 3))) %>% 
  map(\(x) mutate(x, Errors = case_when(
    is.na(Errors) == FALSE ~ "fails to converge", 
    is.na(Warnings) == FALSE ~"out of range estimates"))) %>% 
  map(\(x) group_by(x, Model, Random_effect)) %>% 
  map(\(x) arrange(x, .by_group = TRUE, Parameters, Random_effect)) %>% 
  map(\(x) arrange(x, match(Model, c("GCM", "GBTM", "LCGA", "GMM (class-invariant)", "GMM (class-variant)")))) %>% 
  map(\(x) select(x, Model, "Latent classes", Parameters, Polynomial, Random_effect, Residuals, BIC, AIC, AICC, CAIC,
                  starts_with("Class"), starts_with("APPA"), "aLMR pval", Entropy, Errors)) %>% 
  map(\(x) as_grouped_data(x, groups = "Model", expand_single = TRUE))

set_flextable_defaults(font.family = "Times New Roman", font.size = 6.5, big.mark = "")


### SAPS
all_tbl[[1]] %>% 
  flextable() %>%
  merge_v(c("Latent classes", "Polynomial", "Random_effect", "Residuals")) %>% 
  set_caption(caption = as_paragraph(as_b("Supplementary Table 3. "), "Summary of SAPS models."), align_with_table = FALSE, 
              fp_p = fp_par(text.align = "left")) %>% 
  padding(padding = 0, part = "all") %>% 
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 1) %>% 
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>% 
  bold(part = 'header') %>% 
  add_footer_lines(values = c("Text in bold indicates the best parameter specification of the model.", "AIC: Akaike information criterion, Akaike information corrected criterion, CAIC: Consistent Akaike information criterion, aLMR: Adjusted Lo-Mendell-Rubin likelihood ratio test, APPA: Average posterior probability of assignment, BIC: Baeysian information criterion, GBTM: Group-based trajectory model, GMM: Growth mixture model, LL: Loglikelihood, SAPS: Scale for the assessment of positive symptoms.")) %>% 
  autofit(add_w = 0, add_h = 0) %>%
  save_as_docx(path = file.path(dir, "SupplementaryTable4_SAPS.docx"),
               pr_section = prop_section(page_size = page_size(orient = "landscape"),
                                         type = "continuous",
                                         page_margins = page_mar(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5)))

### SANS
all_tbl[[2]] %>% 
  flextable() %>%
  merge_v(c("Latent classes", "Polynomial", "Random_effect", "Residuals")) %>% 
  set_caption(caption = as_paragraph(as_b("Supplementary Table 4. "), "Summary of SANS models."), align_with_table = FALSE, 
              fp_p = fp_par(text.align = "left")) %>% 
  padding(padding = 0, part = "all") %>% 
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 1) %>% 
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>% 
  bold(part = 'header') %>% 
  add_footer_lines(values = c("Text in bold indicates the best parameter specification of the model.", "AIC: Akaike information criterion, Akaike information corrected criterion, CAIC: Consistent Akaike information criterion, aLMR: Adjusted Lo-Mendell-Rubin likelihood ratio test, APPA: Average posterior probability of assignment, BIC: Baeysian information criterion, GBTM: Group-based trajectory model, GMM: Growth mixture model, LL: Loglikelihood, SANS: Scale for the assessment of positive symptoms.")) %>% 
  autofit(add_w = 0, add_h = 0) %>%
  save_as_docx(path = file.path(dir, "SupplementaryTable5_SANS.docx"),
               pr_section = prop_section(page_size = page_size(orient = "landscape"),
                                         type = "continuous",
                                         page_margins = page_mar(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5)))

### SOFAS
all_tbl[[3]] %>% 
  flextable() %>%
  merge_v(c("Latent classes", "Polynomial", "Random_effect", "Residuals")) %>% 
  set_caption(caption = as_paragraph(as_b("Supplementary Table 5. "), "Summary of SOFAS models."), align_with_table = FALSE, 
              fp_p = fp_par(text.align = "left")) %>% 
  padding(padding = 0, part = "all") %>% 
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 1) %>% 
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>% 
  bold(part = 'header') %>% 
  add_footer_lines(values = c("Text in bold indicates the best parameter specification of the model.", "AIC: Akaike information criterion, Akaike information corrected criterion, CAIC: Consistent Akaike information criterion, aLMR: Adjusted Lo-Mendell-Rubin  likelihood ratio test, APPA: Average posterior probability of assignment, BIC: Baeysian information criterion, GBTM: Group-based trajectory model, GMM: Growth mixture model, LL: Loglikelihood, SOFAS: Social occupational functioning scale.")) %>% 
  autofit(add_w = 0, add_h = 0) %>%
  save_as_docx(path = file.path(dir, "SupplementaryTable3_SAPS.docx"),
               pr_section = prop_section(page_size = page_size(orient = "landscape"),
                                         type = "continuous",
                                         page_margins = page_mar(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5)))

```

## Figure 1. Traj plots 
```{r} 
plots <- map(env, \(env) pluck(env, "plot")) %>% compact()

plots$SAPS.env <- plots$SAPS.env +
  scale_color_manual(name = "", labels = c("Fluctuating (68%)", "Stable-low (32%)"),
                     values = c("#EB5353", "#36AE7C")) +
  scale_linetype_discrete(name = "", labels = c("Fluctuating (68%)", "Stable-low (32%)")) +
  scale_shape_discrete(name = "", labels = c("Fluctuating (68%)", "Stable-low (32%)")) +
  theme(legend.position = c(1, 1),
        legend.justification = c(1, 1),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")) +
  labs(title = bquote(bold("A.") ~ "Trajectories of positive symptoms"), x = "Time (mths)", y = "SAPS")

plots$SANS.env <- plots$SANS.env +
  scale_color_manual(name = "", labels = c("Fluctuating (15%)", "Decreasing (41%)", "Stable-high (44%)"),
                     values = c("#4D96FF", "#36AE7C", "#EB5353")) +
  scale_linetype_discrete(name = "", labels = c("Fluctuating (15%)", "Decreasing (41%)", "Stable-high (44%)")) +
  scale_shape_discrete(name = "", labels = c("Fluctuating (15%)", "Decreasing (41%)", "Stable-high (44%)")) +
  theme(legend.position = c(1, 1),
        legend.justification = c(1, 1),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")) +
  labs(title = bquote(bold("B.") ~ "Trajectories of negative symptoms"), x = "Time (mths)", y = "SANS")

plots$SOFAS.env <- plots$SOFAS.env +
  scale_color_manual(name = "", labels = c("Stable-moderate (43%)", "Increasing (57%)"), 
                     values = c("#EB5353", "#36AE7C")) +
  scale_linetype_discrete(name = "", labels = c("Stable-moderate (43%)", "Increasing (57%)")) +
  scale_shape_discrete(name = "", labels = c("Stable-moderate (43%)", "Increasing (57%)")) +
  theme(legend.position = c(1, 1),
        legend.justification = c(1, 1),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")) +
  labs(title = bquote(bold("C.") ~ "Trajectories of social and occupational functioning"), x = "Time (mths)", y = "SOFAS")

traj_plot <- (plots$SAPS.env / plots$SANS.env / plots$SOFAS.env) &
  theme(text = element_text(size = 13, family = "Times New Roman"), 
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13))

# traj_plot <- traj_plot + 
#   plot_annotation(
#     title = bquote(bold("Figure 1.") ~ "Estimated latent trajectories of outcome over 2-year early intervention services."),
#     caption = "Observed individuals trajectories are plotted in the background.",
#     theme = theme(text = element_text(size = 13, family = "Times New Roman"),
#                   plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 13)
#                   )
#     )

# extrafont::loadfonts()
ggsave(traj_plot, filename = file.path(dir, "Figure1_Trajectories.tiff"), height = 45, width = 40, units = "cm", dpi = 300, compression = "lzw")
```

## Pie charts 
```{r} 

pie_data <- env$SAPS.env$SAPS_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(C_SAPS) & !is.na(PSR)) %>% 
  group_by(C_SAPS, PSR) %>%
  summarise(count = n()) %>%
  mutate(percentage = count / sum(count) * 100) %>% 
  ungroup()
  
pies <- map(c(1, 2), \(n) pie_data %>% filter(C_SAPS == n)) %>% 
  map(\(df) plot_ly(df, labels = ~PSR, values = ~percentage, type = 'pie'))

  
  
# layout(title = "Interactive Pie Chart of Categories")
# map(\(df) pie(df$percentage, labels = PSR))
```

## Figure 2. Circle plots 
### Data 
```{r} 
circle_df <- env %>%
  tail(-1) %>%
  map2(c("SAPS_df", "SANS_df", "SOFAS_df"), \(env, df) pluck(env, df)) %>% 
  map(~ select(., c(pin, any_of(C)))) %>% 
  reduce(full_join, by = 'pin') %>% #use full_join to keep all observations
  # select(pin, all_of(C)) %>% 
  mutate(across(all_of(C), ~ to_factor(., levels = "values"))) %>% 
  mutate(C_SOFAS = labelled(C_SOFAS, labels = c('Stable-moderate' = 1, 'Increasing' = 2), label = c('Functioning trajectories'))) %>% 
  mutate(C_SAPS = labelled(C_SAPS, labels = c('Fluctuating' = 1, 'Stable-low' = 2), label = c('Positive symptoms trajectories'))) %>% 
  mutate(C_SANS = labelled(C_SANS, labels = c('Fluctuating ' = 1, 'Decreasing' = 2, 'Stable-high' = 3), label = c('Positive symptoms trajectories'))) %>% 
  mutate(across(all_of(C), ~ to_factor(., levels = "labels")))
```

### Frequency tables 
```{r} 
circle_df1 <- circle_df %>%
  na.omit() %>% 
  group_by(C_SAPS) %>%
  mutate(SAPS_n = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(C_SOFAS) %>%
  mutate(SOFAS_n = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(C_SAPS, C_SOFAS) %>%
  reframe(
    count = n(),
    across(c('SAPS_n', 'SOFAS_n'))
  ) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  mutate(across(c(SAPS_n, SOFAS_n), ~ round(count/. * 100, 0), .names = '{.col}_pct'))

circle_df2 <- circle_df %>%
  na.omit() %>% 
  group_by(C_SANS) %>%
  mutate(SANS_n = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(C_SOFAS) %>%
  mutate(SOFAS_n = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(C_SANS, C_SOFAS) %>%
  reframe(
    count = n(),
    across(c('SANS_n', 'SOFAS_n'))
  ) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  mutate(across(c(SANS_n, SOFAS_n), ~ round(count/. * 100, 0), .names = '{.col}_pct'))

circle_df3 <- circle_df %>%
  # mutate(C_SANS = fct_recode(C_SANS, "Fluctuating " = "Fluctuating")) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  group_by(C_SANS) %>%
  mutate(SANS_n = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(C_SAPS) %>%
  mutate(SAPS_n = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(C_SAPS, C_SANS) %>%
  reframe(
    count = n(),
    across(c('SAPS_n', 'SANS_n'))
  ) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  mutate(across(c(SAPS_n, SANS_n), ~ round(count/. * 100, 0), .names = '{.col}_pct')) %>% 
  select(c(C_SANS, C_SAPS, count, everything()))
  
```

### Risk Ratios 
```{r} 
library(epitools)

# RR <- pmap(list(
#   c('Stable-low', 'Stable-low', 'Fluctuating', 'Fluctuating'),  
#   c('Fluctuating', 'Fluctuating', 'Stable-low', 'Stable-low'), 
#   c('Increasing', 'Stable-moderate', 'Increasing', 'Stable-moderate'), 
#   c('Stable-moderate', 'Increasing', 'Stable-moderate', 'Increasing')), 
#            \(SAPS1, SAPS2, SOFAS1, SOFAS2) table(
#              factor(circle_df$C_SAPS, levels = c(SAPS1, SAPS2)),
#              factor(circle_df$C_SOFAS, levels = c(SOFAS1, SOFAS2)))) %>% 
#   map(~ epi.2by2(.x, method = "cohort.count", interpret = FALSE)) %>% 
#   map(~ pluck(.x, 'massoc.summary')) %>% 
#   map(~ slice(.x, 1)) %>% 
#   map(~ pull(.x, 'est'))


#### SAPS / SOFAS
wald_SAPS_SOFAS <- map(
  list("neither", "columns", "rows", "both"),
  ~ riskratio(
    table(factor(circle_df$C_SAPS, levels = c("Stable-low", "Fluctuating")), factor(circle_df$C_SOFAS, levels = c("Increasing", "Stable-moderate"))),
    method = "wald", rev = .x, verbose = TRUE
  )
)

links_SAPS_SOFAS <- wald_SAPS_SOFAS %>% 
  map(~ pluck(.x, "data")) %>% 
  map(~ as.data.frame(.x)) %>%
  map(~ paste(rownames(.x)[2], colnames(.x)[2], sep = " - "))

RR_SAPS_SOFAS <- wald_SAPS_SOFAS %>% 
  map(~ pluck(.x, "measure")) %>%
  map(~ as.data.frame(.x)) %>%
  map(~ slice(.x, -1)) %>%  
  map(~ pull(.x, "estimate")) %>% 
  {tibble(link = unlist(links_SAPS_SOFAS), RR = round(unlist(.), 2))}

#### SANS / SOFAS
wald_SANS_SOFAS <- map(
  list("neither", "columns", "rows", "both"),
  ~ riskratio(
    table(factor(circle_df$C_SANS, levels = c( "Decreasing", "Fluctuating", "Stable-high")), factor(circle_df$C_SOFAS, levels = c( "Increasing", "Stable-moderate"))),
    method = "wald", rev = .x, verbose = TRUE
  )
)

links_SANS_SOFAS <- wald_SANS_SOFAS %>% 
  map(~ pluck(.x, "data")) %>% 
  map(~ as.data.frame(.x)) %>%
  map(~ list(paste(rownames(.x)[2], colnames(.x)[2], sep = " - "),
             paste(rownames(.x)[3], colnames(.x)[2], sep = " - ")))

RR_SANS_SOFAS <- wald_SANS_SOFAS %>% 
  map(~ pluck(.x, "measure")) %>%
  map(~ as.data.frame(.x)) %>%
  map(~ list(slice(.x, 2), slice(.x, 3))) %>%
  map_depth(2, ~ pull(.x, "estimate")) %>% 
  {tibble(link = unlist(links_SANS_SOFAS), RR = round(unlist(.), 2))} %>% 
  distinct(link, .keep_all = TRUE)
  
  
#### SAPS / SANS
wald_SANS_SAPS <- map(
  list("neither", "columns", "rows", "both"),
  ~ riskratio(
    table(factor(circle_df$C_SANS, levels = c("Stable-high", "Fluctuating ", "Decreasing")), circle_df$C_SAPS),
    method = "wald", rev = .x, verbose = TRUE
  )
)

# wald_SAPS_SANS <- map(
#   list("neither", "columns", "rows", "both"),
#   ~ riskratio(
#     table(factor(circle_df$C_SAPS, levels = c("Stable-low", "Fluctuating")), factor(circle_df$C_SANS, levels = c( "Decreasing", "Fluctuating ", "Stable-high"))),
#     method = "wald", rev = .x, verbose = TRUE
#   )
# )

links_SANS_SAPS <- wald_SANS_SAPS %>% 
  map(~ pluck(.x, "data")) %>% 
  map(~ as.data.frame(.x)) %>%
  map(~ list(paste(rownames(.x)[2], colnames(.x)[2], sep = " - "),
             paste(rownames(.x)[3], colnames(.x)[2], sep = " - ")))

# RR_SAPS_SANS <- wald_SAPS_SANS %>% 
#   map(~ pluck(.x, "measure")) %>%
#   map(~ as.data.frame(.x)) %>%
#   map(~ slice(.x, -1)) %>%  
#   map(~ pull(.x, "estimate")) %>% 
#   {tibble(link = unlist(links_SAPS_SANS), RR = round(unlist(.), 2))}


RR_SANS_SAPS <- wald_SANS_SAPS %>% 
  map(~ pluck(.x, "measure")) %>%
  map(~ as.data.frame(.x)) %>%
  map(~ list(slice(.x, 2), slice(.x, 3))) %>%
  map_depth(2, ~ pull(.x, "estimate")) %>% 
  {tibble(link = unlist(links_SANS_SAPS), RR = round(unlist(.), 2))} %>% 
  distinct(link, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

### SOFAS/SAPS 
```{r} 
tiff(file.path(dir, "Figure2_CirclePlot.tiff"), height = 16, width = 35, units = 'cm', res = 300) # bg = 'transparent'

par(family = "Times New Roman", ps = 12, adj = 0.5, mfrow = c(1, 3),
    mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0), 
    mai = c(0, 0, 0, 0), 
    oma = c(0, 0, 0, 0))

# layout <- layout(matrix(c(0, 1, 0, 
#                           2, 0, 3), 2, 3, byrow = TRUE))
# layout.show(layout)
circos.clear()  
par(ps = 15)
.circle1 <- chordDiagram(select(circle_df1, 1:3),
              order = c("Stable-moderate", "Increasing", "Stable-low", "Fluctuating"),
              grid.col = c('Fluctuating' = '#EB5353', 
                          'Stable-low' = '#36AE7C', 
                          'Stable-moderate' = 'grey',
                          'Increasing' = 'grey'),
             annotationTrack = c('grid', 'name'),
             annotationTrackHeight = c(0.03, 0.01))

par(ps = 12)
highlight.sector(
  text = "Positive symptoms trajectories",
  sector.index = tail(get.all.sector.index(), 2), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.2,
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

highlight.sector(
  text = "Functioning trajectories",
  sector.index = head(get.all.sector.index(), 2), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.2,
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

# pwalk(list(.circle1$rn, .circle1$x1, .circle1$value1, RR_SAPS_SOFAS$RR),
#     \(rn, x1, v1, RR) circos.text(labels = RR,
#             x = x1 - v1 + v1/2, y = -20,
#             sector.index = rn, track.index = 1,
#             facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 10))

pwalk(list(.circle1$rn, .circle1$x1, .circle1$value1, circle_df1$SAPS_n_pct),
    \(rn, x1, v1, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"),
            x = x1 - v1 + v1/2, y = -20,
            sector.index = rn, track.index = 1,
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 10, cex = 1.2))

pwalk(list(.circle1$cn, .circle1$x2, .circle1$value2, circle_df1$SOFAS_n_pct),
    \(cn, x2, v2, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"),
            x = x2 - v2 + v2/2, y = -20,
            sector.index = cn, track.index = 1,
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 10, cex = 1.2))

### Title
# mtext(text = expression(paste(bold('Figure 2. '), 'Cross-distribution of individuals between', bold(' A. '), 'positive symptoms and functioing trajectories,',  bold(' B. '), 'negative symptoms and functioning trajectories, and',  bold(' C. '), 'positive and negative symptoms trajectories.')),
#   side = 3,
#   line = -1.5,
#   adj = 0,
# )

mtext(text = expression(bold('A.')),
  side = 1,
  line = -6,
  adj = 0,
)

# mtext(
#   text = "Each link represents the number of intersecting individuals between the two trajectories it connects, along with the corresponding proportions it represents in each of these trajectories. 
# For example, 76% of individuals from the Stable-low trajectory of positive symptoms also belong to the Increasing trajectory of functioing, represanting 44% of it.",
#   side = 1,
#   line = -1.5,
#   adj = 0,
# )

```

### SOFAS/SANS 
```{r} 
par(ps = 15)
.circle2 <- chordDiagram(select(circle_df2, 1:3),
             order = c('Stable-moderate', 'Increasing', 'Decreasing', 'Fluctuating ',  'Stable-high'),
              grid.col = c('Decreasing' = '#36AE7C', 
                          'Fluctuating ' = '#4D96FF', 
                          'Stable-high' = '#EB5353',
                          'Stable-moderate' = 'grey',
                          'Increasing' = 'grey'),
             annotationTrack = c('grid', 'name'),
             annotationTrackHeight = c(0.03, 0.01))

par(ps = 12)
highlight.sector(
  text = "Negative symptoms trajectories",
  sector.index = tail(get.all.sector.index(), 3), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.2,
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

highlight.sector(
  text = "Functioning trajectories",
  sector.index = head(get.all.sector.index(), 2), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.2,
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

pwalk(list(.circle2$rn, .circle2$x1, .circle2$value1, circle_df2$SANS_n_pct),  
    \(rn, x1, v1, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"), 
            x = x1 - v1 + v1/2, y = -20, 
            sector.index = rn, track.index = 1, 
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 12, cex = 1.2))

pwalk(list(.circle2$cn, .circle2$x2, .circle2$value2, circle_df2$SOFAS_n_pct),  
    \(cn, x2, v2, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"),
            x = x2 - v2 + v2/2, y = -20, 
            sector.index = cn, track.index = 1, 
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 12, cex = 1.2))
### Footnote
mtext(text = expression(bold('B.')),
  side = 1,
  line = -6,
  adj = 0,
)
```

### SAPS/SANS 
```{r} 
par(ps = 15)
.circle3 <- chordDiagram(select(circle_df3, c(C_SAPS, C_SANS, count)),
             order = c('Decreasing', 'Fluctuating ', 'Stable-high', 'Stable-low', 'Fluctuating'),
             grid.col = c('Decreasing' = 'grey',
                          'Fluctuating ' = 'grey',
                          'Stable-high' = 'grey',
                          'Fluctuating' = '#EB5353',
                          'Stable-low' = '#36AE7C'),
             annotationTrack = c('grid', 'name'),
             annotationTrackHeight = c(0.03, 0.01))

par(ps = 12)
highlight.sector(
  text = "Positive symptoms trajectories",
  sector.index = tail(get.all.sector.index(), 2), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.2, 
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

highlight.sector(
  text = "Negative symptoms trajectories",
  sector.index = head(get.all.sector.index(), 3), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.2,
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

pwalk(list(.circle3$rn, .circle3$x1, .circle3$value1, circle_df3$SAPS_n_pct),  
    \(rn, x1, v1, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"), 
            x = x1 - v1 + v1/2, y = -20, 
            sector.index = rn, track.index = 1, 
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 12, cex = 1.2))

pwalk(list(.circle3$cn, .circle3$x2, .circle3$value2, circle_df3$SANS_n_pct),  
    \(cn, x2, v2, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"), 
            x = x2 - v2 + v2/2, y = -20, 
            sector.index = cn, track.index = 1, 
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 12, cex = 1.2))

### Footnote
mtext(text = expression(bold('C.')),
  side = 1,
  line = -6,
  adj = 0,
)

dev.off()
```

## Figure 3/4. Forest plots 
```{r Dataframes} 
R3STEP <- map(env, \(env) pluck(env, "R3STEP_unstd")) %>% compact()
D3STEP <- map(env, \(env) pluck(env, "D3STEP_unstd")) %>% compact()
# MixREG <- map(env, \(env) pluck(env, "MixREG_stdyx")) %>% compact()
```

### R3STEP 
```{r, include = FALSE} 
#### Data
R3STEP_df <- R3STEP %>%
  map(\(df) filter(df, str_detect(paramHeader, "C#\\d.ON"))) %>%
  map(\(df) filter(df, is.na(errors))) %>%
  map(\(df) select(df, -warnings, -errors)) %>%
  map2(tail(env, -1), \(df, env) filter(df, pval < (0.05 / length(env$R3STEP_models) ))) %>%
  imap(\(x, idx) mutate(x, outcome = str_remove(idx, ".env"))) %>%
  reduce(~ merge(.x, .y, all = TRUE)) %>% 
  # mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 2))) %>%
  group_by(outcome) %>%
  arrange(OR_est, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  relocate(starts_with("mean"), .after = "param") %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(outcome =  factor(outcome, levels = c("SOFAS", "SANS", "SAPS"))) %>% 
  arrange(outcome) %>% 
  mutate(paramHeader = case_when(
    outcome == "SANS" & paramHeader == "C#1.ON" ~ "    Fluctuating",
    outcome == "SANS" & paramHeader == "C#2.ON" ~ "    Decreasing",
    .default = NA
    )) %>% 
  var_to_lbl(param) %>% 
  mutate(paramHeader = case_when(outcome != 'SANS' ~ param, .default = paramHeader))

means_R3STEP <- R3STEP_df %>%
  select(param, starts_with("mean_est")) %>% 
  mutate(param = case_when(is.na(mean_est3) ~ NA, .default = param)) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  arrange(desc(row_number())) %>% 
  mutate(across(starts_with('mean_est'), ~ case_when(.x >= 1 & .x <= 2 ~ .x - 1, .default = .x))) 

R3STEP_n <- R3STEP_df %>%
  count(outcome) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = outcome, values_from = n)

i <- 3

# R3STEP_df <- R3STEP_df %>% data_edit(code = TRUE, viewer = "dialog")
```

```{r, include = FALSE} 
#### Plot
tiff(file.path(dir, "Figure3_ForestPlotR3STEP_OR.tiff"), pointsize = 11, height = 20, width = 30, units = "cm", res = 300, compression = "lzw") # bg = "transparent"

par(mar = c(bottom = 5, left = 0, top = 0, right = 0))
R3STEP_forest <- forest.default(
  slab = R3STEP_df$paramHeader,
  # ilab = cbind(R3STEP_df$`mean_est2`, R3STEP_df$`mean_est1`, R3STEP_df$`mean_est3`),
  ilab.xpos = seq(from = -4, to = -1, length.out = 3),
  # ilab.xpos = seq(from = -9.5, to = -6.5, length.out = 3),
  x = R3STEP_df$OR_est,
  ci.lb = R3STEP_df$OR_low2.5,
  ci.ub = R3STEP_df$OR_up2.5,
  rows = c(
    seq(R3STEP_n$SOFAS),
    c(12, 14), #SANS classes
    seq(from = R3STEP_n$SOFAS + R3STEP_n$SANS + 2 * i + 1, length.out = R3STEP_n$SAPS)
  ),
  xlim = c(-7, 8),
  # xlim = c(-13, 5),
  # alim = c(0, 2),
  at = c(0, 1, 3, 6),
  # at = c(-6, -3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3),
  ylim = c(0, R3STEP_n$SANS + R3STEP_n$SAPS + R3STEP_n$SOFAS + 3 * i + 2),
  refline = 1,
  efac = c(0, 0),
  pch = 19, 
  psize = 1, #R3STEP_df$OR_est
  # lwd = 5,
  digits = 2L,
  cex = 1,
  top = 4,
  xlab = expression(italic('Favours "worse" trajectory'), bold("Trajectory membership"), italic('Favours "better" trajectory')),
header = c("Baseline predictors", ""), 
  fonts = "Times New Roman"
)

#### Means
SAPS_y <- head(R3STEP_forest$rows, R3STEP_n$SAPS)
SOFAS_y <- tail(R3STEP_forest$rows, R3STEP_n$SOFAS)
SANS_y <- setdiff(R3STEP_forest$rows, c(SOFAS_y, SAPS_y)) %>% 
  setdiff(seq(from = max(.) + 1, to = min(.)), .)

text(
  labels = c(means_R3STEP$mean_est2, means_R3STEP$mean_est1, means_R3STEP$mean_est3),
  x = rep(R3STEP_forest[["ilab.xpos"]], each = length(means_R3STEP$mean_est1)),
  y = rep(c(SAPS_y, SANS_y, SOFAS_y), times = 3),
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex, 
)

text(
  labels = means_R3STEP$param,
  x = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
  y = c(SAPS_y, SANS_y, SOFAS_y),
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex,
  pos = 4
)

# #### Title & Header
# par(font = 2)
# text(
#   labels = expression(paste(bold("Figure 3. "), "Forest plot for baseline predictors of trajectory membership.")),
#   x = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
#   y = R3STEP_forest$ylim[[2]],
#   pos = 4
# )

text(
  labels = "Estimated mean",
  x = median(R3STEP_forest$ilab.xpos),
  y = R3STEP_forest$ylim[[2]] - 2,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

text(
  labels = expression(bold("OR [95% CI]"^1)),
  x = R3STEP_forest$textpos[[2]] + 0.05,
  y = R3STEP_forest$ylim[[2]] - 2,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex, 
  pos = 2
)

#### Subtitle & subheader
par(font = 4)
text(
  labels = c("SAPS", "SANS", "SOFAS"),
  x = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
  y = c(
    max(SAPS_y) + 1,
    max(SANS_y) + 1,
    max(SOFAS_y) + 1
  ),
  pos = 4,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

par()
text(
  labels = expression(italic("Stable-low"), italic("Fluctuating"^2)),
  x = head(R3STEP_forest$ilab.xpos, -1),
  y = max(SAPS_y) + 1,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

text(
  labels = expression(italic("Decreasing"), italic("Fluctuating"), italic("Stable-high"^2)),
  x = R3STEP_forest$ilab.xpos,
  y = max(SANS_y) + 1,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

par()
text(
  labels = expression(italic("Increasing"), italic("Stable-moderate"^2)),
  x = head(R3STEP_forest$ilab.xpos, -1),
  y = max(SOFAS_y) + 1,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

# #### Footnote
# mtext(
#   text = expression(""^1 ~ "Reference trajectory"),
#   side = 1,
#   line = 4,
#   at = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
#   adj = 0,
#   cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
# )
# 
# 
# mtext(
#   text = expression(""^2 ~ "All results are statistically significant using a Bonferroni-corrected threshold (p < 0.001)."),
#   side = 1,
#   line = 5,
#   at = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
#   adj = 0,
#   cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
# )
# 
# par(font = 1)
# mtext(
#   text = expression(""^3 ~ "Log transformed"),
#   side = 1,
#   line = 6,
#   at = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
#   adj = 0,
#   cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
# )
# 
# mtext(
#   text = expression(""^4 ~ "Binary categorical variable [0 = no, 1 = yes], the mean represents the proportion of cases coded as yes."),
#   side = 1,
#   line = 7,
#   at = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
#   adj = 0,
#   cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
# )
# 
# mtext(
#   text = paste(strwrap(
#     "CI: Confidence interval, OR: Odd ratio, PS: Positive symptoms, SANS: Scale for the assessment of negative symptoms, SAPS: Scale for the assessment of positive symptoms, SOFAS: Social occupational functioning scale.",
#     width = 170
#   ), collapse = "\n"),
#   side = 1,
#   line = 9,
#   at = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
#   adj = 0,
#   cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
# )

dev.off()
```
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Desktop/MplusLGM/Results/R3STEP_ForestPlot.pdf)

### R3STEP - NS 
```{r, include = FALSE} 
#### Data
R3STEP_df <- R3STEP %>%
  map(\(df) filter(df, str_detect(paramHeader, "C#\\d.ON"))) %>%
  map(\(df) filter(df, is.na(errors))) %>%
  map(\(df) select(df, -warnings, -errors)) %>%
  map2(tail(env, -1), \(df, env) filter(df, pval > (0.001))) %>%
  imap(\(x, idx) mutate(x, outcome = str_remove(idx, ".env"))) %>%
  reduce(~ merge(.x, .y, all = TRUE)) %>% 
  # mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 2))) %>%
  group_by(outcome) %>%
  arrange(OR_est, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  relocate(starts_with("mean"), .after = "param") %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(param) %>% 
  mutate(outcome =  factor(outcome, levels = c("SOFAS", "SANS", "SAPS"))) %>% 
  arrange(outcome) %>% 
  mutate(paramHeader = case_when(
    outcome == "SANS" & paramHeader == "C#1.ON" ~ "    Fluctuating",
    outcome == "SANS" & paramHeader == "C#2.ON" ~ "    Decreasing",
    .default = NA
    )) %>% 
  var_to_lbl(param) %>% 
  mutate(paramHeader = case_when(outcome != 'SANS' ~ param, .default = paramHeader)) %>% 
  write_xlsx(path = glue(getwd(), 'results', 'R3STEP_{today()}.xlsx', .sep = '/'))

means_R3STEP <- R3STEP_df %>%
  select(param, starts_with("mean_est")) %>% 
  mutate(param = case_when(is.na(mean_est3) ~ NA, .default = param)) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  arrange(desc(row_number())) %>% 
  mutate(across(starts_with('mean_est'), ~ case_when(.x >= 1 & .x <= 2 ~ .x - 1, .default = .x))) 

R3STEP_n <- R3STEP_df %>%
  count(outcome) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = outcome, values_from = n)

i <- 3

# R3STEP_df <- R3STEP_df %>% data_edit(code = TRUE, viewer = "dialog")
```

```{r, include = FALSE} 
#### Plot
png(file.path(dir, "SupplemantaryTable4_ForestPlotR3STEP.png"), pointsize = 11, height = 20, width = 30, units = "cm", bg = "transparent",res = 600)

par(mar = c(bottom = 10, left = 0, top = 3, right = 0))
R3STEP_forest <- forest.default(
  slab = R3STEP_df$paramHeader,
  # ilab = cbind(R3STEP_df$`mean_est2`, R3STEP_df$`mean_est1`, R3STEP_df$`mean_est3`),
  ilab.xpos = seq(from = -4, to = -1, length.out = 3),
  # ilab.xpos = seq(from = -9.5, to = -6.5, length.out = 3),
  x = R3STEP_df$OR_est,
  ci.lb = R3STEP_df$OR_low2.5,
  ci.ub = R3STEP_df$OR_up2.5,
  rows = c(
    seq(R3STEP_n$SOFAS),
    c(26, 27, 29, 30), #SANS classes
    seq(from = R3STEP_n$SOFAS + R3STEP_n$SANS + 2 * i + 2, length.out = R3STEP_n$SAPS)
  ),
  xlim = c(-7, 8),
  # xlim = c(-13, 5),
  # alim = c(0, 2),
  at = c(0, 1, 3, 6),
  # at = c(-6, -3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3),
  ylim = c(0, R3STEP_n$SANS + R3STEP_n$SAPS + R3STEP_n$SOFAS + 3 * i + 3),
  refline = 1,
  efac = c(0, 0),
  pch = 19, 
  psize = 1, #R3STEP_df$OR_est
  # lwd = 5,
  digits = 2L,
  cex = 1,
  top = 4,
  xlab = expression(italic('Favours "worse" trajectory'), bold("Trajectory membership"), italic('Favours "better" trajectory')),
header = c("Baseline predictors", ""), 
  fonts = "Times New Roman"
)

#### Means
SAPS_y <- head(R3STEP_forest$rows, R3STEP_n$SAPS)
SOFAS_y <- tail(R3STEP_forest$rows, R3STEP_n$SOFAS)
SANS_y <- setdiff(R3STEP_forest$rows, c(SOFAS_y, SAPS_y)) %>% 
  setdiff(seq(from = max(.) + 1, to = min(.)), .)

text(
  labels = c(means_R3STEP$mean_est2, means_R3STEP$mean_est1, means_R3STEP$mean_est3),
  x = rep(R3STEP_forest[["ilab.xpos"]], each = length(means_R3STEP$mean_est1)),
  y = rep(c(SAPS_y, SANS_y, SOFAS_y), times = 3),
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex, 
)

text(
  labels = means_R3STEP$param,
  x = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
  y = c(SAPS_y, SANS_y, SOFAS_y),
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex,
  pos = 4
)

#### Title & Header
par(font = 2)
text(
  labels = expression(paste(bold("Figure 3. "), "Forest plot for baseline predictors of trajectory membership.")),
  x = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
  y = R3STEP_forest$ylim[[2]],
  pos = 4
)

text(
  labels = "Estimated mean",
  x = median(R3STEP_forest$ilab.xpos),
  y = R3STEP_forest$ylim[[2]] - 2,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

text(
  labels = expression(bold("OR [95% CI]"^2)),
  x = R3STEP_forest$textpos[[2]] + 0.05,
  y = R3STEP_forest$ylim[[2]] - 2,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex, 
  pos = 2
)

#### Subtitle & subheader
par(font = 4)
text(
  labels = c("SAPS", "SANS", "SOFAS"),
  x = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
  y = c(
    max(SAPS_y) + 1,
    max(SANS_y) + 1,
    max(SOFAS_y) + 1
  ),
  pos = 4,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

par()
text(
  labels = expression(italic("Stable-low"), italic("Fluctuating"^1)),
  x = head(R3STEP_forest$ilab.xpos, -1),
  y = max(SAPS_y) + 1,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

text(
  labels = expression(italic("Decreasing"), italic("Fluctuating"), italic("Stable-high"^1)),
  x = R3STEP_forest$ilab.xpos,
  y = max(SANS_y) + 1,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

par()
text(
  labels = expression(italic("Increasing"), italic("Stable-moderate"^1)),
  x = head(R3STEP_forest$ilab.xpos, -1),
  y = max(SOFAS_y) + 1,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

#### Footnote
mtext(
  text = expression(""^1 ~ "Reference trajectory"),
  side = 1,
  line = 4,
  at = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
  adj = 0,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

par(font = 1)
mtext(
  text = expression(""^2 ~ "All results are statistically significant using a Bonferroni-corrected threshold (p < 0.001)."),
  side = 1,
  line = 5,
  at = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
  adj = 0,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

mtext(
  text = expression(""^3 ~ "Binary categorical variable [0 = no, 1 = yes], the mean represents the proportion of cases coded as yes."),
  side = 1,
  line = 6,
  at = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
  adj = 0,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

mtext(
  text = paste(strwrap(
    "CI: Confidence interval, OR: Odd ratio, PS: Positive symptoms, SANS: Scale for the assessment of negative symptoms, SAPS: Scale for the assessment of positive symptoms, SOFAS: Social occupational functioning scale.",
    width = 170
  ), collapse = "\n"),
  side = 1,
  line = 8,
  at = R3STEP_forest$xlim[[1]],
  adj = 0,
  cex = R3STEP_forest$cex
)

dev.off()
```

### Supplementary Table 6.  ns results - R3STEP 
```{r}
# R3STEP_ns <- R3STEP %>%
#   map(\(df) filter(df, str_detect(paramHeader, "C#\\d.ON"))) %>%
#   map(\(df) filter(df, is.na(errors))) %>%
#   map(\(df) select(df, -warnings, -errors)) %>%
#   imap(\(x, idx) mutate(x, outcome = str_remove(idx, ".env"))) %>%
#   reduce(~ merge(.x, .y, all = TRUE)) %>%
#   mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 2))) %>%
#   group_by(outcome) %>%
#   arrange(desc(outcome), OR_est, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
#   relocate(starts_with("mean"), .after = "param") %>% 
#   ungroup() %>% 
#   var_to_lbl(param)
```


### D3STEP 
```{r, include = FALSE} 
#### Data
D3STEP_df1 <- D3STEP %>%
  modify_in("SOFAS.env", \(df) filter(df, !str_detect(param, "DIFF12"))) %>% 
  modify_in("SAPS.env", \(df) filter(df, !str_detect(param, "DIFF12"))) %>% 
  modify_in("SANS.env", \(df) filter(df, !str_detect(param, "DIFF12|DIFF32|DIFF31"))) %>% 
  map2(tail(env, -1), \(df, env) filter(df, WaldChiSq_PValue < (0.05 / length(env$D3STEP_models) ))) %>%
  map(\(df) filter(df, !(paramHeader == "New.Additional.Parameters" & pval > 0.05))) %>% # only for SANS
  map(\(df) filter(df, is.na(errors))) %>%
  map(\(df) select(df, -warnings, -errors)) %>%
  map(\(df) separate_wider_delim(df, cols = param, delim = " ", names = c("param", "diff"), too_few = "align_start"))
  # map(\(x) mutate(x, across(c("OR_est", "OR_low2.5", "OR_up2.5"), ~ transf.lnortod.logis(log(.x))))) %>%
  # map(\(x) mutate(x, x = coalesce(SMD_est, OR_est))) %>%
  # map(\(x) mutate(x, ci.lb = coalesce(SMD_low2.5, OR_low2.5))) %>%
  # map(\(x) mutate(x, ci.ub = coalesce(SMD_up2.5, OR_up2.5)))

D3STEP_cont <- D3STEP_df1 %>%
  map(\(df) filter(df, !str_detect(paramHeader, "Thresholds") & is.na(OR_est))) %>% 
  map(\(df) pivot_wider(df, names_from = LatentClass, names_glue = "mean_est{LatentClass}", values_from = est)) %>%
  map(\(df) reframe(df, .by = param, across(c(diff, SMD_est, SMD_low2.5, SMD_up2.5, matches("mean_est\\d")), ~ na.omit(unique(.))))) %>%
  imap(\(df, idx) mutate(df, outcome = str_remove(idx, ".env"))) %>% 
  reduce(~ merge(.x, .y, all = TRUE)) %>% 
  group_by(outcome) %>%
  arrange(outcome, SMD_est, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(ifelse(outcome == "SANS", c(param, SMD_est), NA)) %>% 
  mutate(outcome =  factor(outcome, levels = c("SOFAS", "SANS", "SAPS"))) %>% 
  arrange(outcome)
  
D3STEP_cat <- D3STEP_df1 %>%
  map(\(df) filter(df, !str_detect(paramHeader, "Means") & is.na(SMD_est))) %>% 
  map(\(df) pivot_wider(df, names_from = LatentClass, names_glue = "mean_est{LatentClass}", values_from = est)) %>%
  map(\(df) mutate(df, param = str_remove(param, regex("\\$\\d")))) %>%
  map(\(df) reframe(df, .by = param, across(c(diff, OR_est, OR_low2.5, OR_up2.5, matches("mean_est\\d")), ~ na.omit(unique(.))))) %>%
  imap(\(df, idx) mutate(df, outcome = str_remove(idx, ".env"))) %>% 
  reduce(~ merge(.x, .y, all = TRUE)) %>% 
  group_by(outcome) %>%
  arrange(outcome, OR_est, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(ifelse(outcome == "SANS", c(param, OR_est), NA)) %>% 
  mutate(outcome =  factor(outcome, levels = c("SOFAS", "SANS", "SAPS"))) %>% 
  arrange(outcome)

D3STEP_df2 <- list(D3STEP_cont, D3STEP_cat) %>% 
  map(\(df) mutate(df, across(starts_with("mean"), ~ as.numeric(.x)))) %>%
  map(\(df) mutate(df, across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 2)))) %>%
  # map(\(df) mutate(df, across(ends_with(c("est", "low2.5", "up2.5")), ~ case_when(. > 100 ~ 50, .default = .)))) %>%
  # map(\(df) filter(df, if_any(ends_with("est"), ~ !is.infinite(.)))) %>% ######### REMOVE INFNITE ORs FROM FOREST PLOT 
  map(\(df) select(df, outcome, everything())) %>%
  map(\(df) mutate(df, diff_lbl = case_when(
    outcome == "SOFAS" & diff == "DIFF12" ~ "    Stable-moderate vs. Increasing",
    outcome == "SAPS" & diff == "DIFF12" ~ "    Stable-low vs. Fluctuating",
    outcome == "SANS" & diff == "DIFF21" ~ "    Decreasing vs. Fluctuating",
    outcome == "SANS" & diff == "DIFF23" ~ "    Decreasing vs. Stable-high",
    outcome == "SANS" & diff == "DIFF13" ~ "    Fluctuating vs. Stable-high",
    .default = NA
    ))) %>% 
  map(\(df) var_to_lbl(df, param)) %>% 
  map(\(df) mutate(df, param_diff = case_when(outcome == 'SANS' ~ diff_lbl, .default = param)))

means_D3STEP <- D3STEP_df2 %>%
  map(\(df) select(df, param, starts_with("mean"))) %>% 
  map(\(df) mutate(df, param = case_when(is.na(mean_est3) ~ NA, .default = param))) %>% 
  map(\(df) distinct(df)) %>% 
  map(\(df) arrange(df, desc(row_number())))

D3STEP_n <- D3STEP_df2 %>%
  map(\(df) count(df, outcome)) %>%
  map(\(df) pivot_wider(df, names_from = outcome, values_from = n))

i <- 3

# D3STEP_df5 <- D3STEP_df4 %>% data_edit(code = TRUE, viewer = "dialog")
```

#### Continuous variables (SMD) 
```{r, include = FALSE} 
#### Plot
tiff(file.path(dir, "Figure4A_ForestPlot_D3STEP.tiff"), pointsize = 11, height = 20, width = 30, units = "cm", res = 300) # bg = "transparent",

par(mar = c(bottom = 5, left = 0, top = 0, right = 0))

D3STEP_forcont <- forest.default(
  slab = D3STEP_df2[[1]]$param_diff,
  # ilab = cbind(means$mean_est1, means$mean_est2, means$mean_est3),
  ilab.xpos = seq(from = -7, to = -3.5, length.out = 3),
  x = D3STEP_df2[[1]]$SMD_est,
  ci.lb = D3STEP_df2[[1]]$SMD_low2.5,
  ci.ub = D3STEP_df2[[1]]$SMD_up2.5,
  rows = c(
    seq(D3STEP_n[[1]]$SOFAS),
    c(9:11, 13:15, 17),
    seq(from = D3STEP_n[[1]]$SOFAS + D3STEP_n[[1]]$SANS + i * 2 + 2, length.out = D3STEP_n[[1]]$SAPS)
  ),
  xlim = c(-10, 5),
  alim = c(-2.5, 2.5),
  ylim = c(0, 24 + 4),
  refline = 0,
  pch = 19,
  efac = c(0, 0),
  psize = 1,
  cex = 1,
  xlab = expression(italic('Higher in "worse" trajectory'), bold("Trajectory differences"), italic('Higher in "better" trajectory')),
  header = c("Distal outcomes", ""), 
  fonts = "Times New Roman"
)

#### Means
SAPS_y <- head(D3STEP_forcont$rows, D3STEP_n[[1]]$SAPS)
SOFAS_y <- tail(D3STEP_forcont$rows, D3STEP_n[[1]]$SOFAS)
SANS_y <- setdiff(D3STEP_forcont$rows, c(SOFAS_y, SAPS_y)) %>% 
  setdiff(seq(from = max(.) + 1, to = min(.)), .)

text(
  labels = c(means_D3STEP[[1]]$mean_est2, means_D3STEP[[1]]$mean_est1, means_D3STEP[[1]]$mean_est3),
  x = rep(D3STEP_forcont[["ilab.xpos"]], each = length(means_D3STEP[[1]]$mean_est1)),
  y = rep(c(SAPS_y, SANS_y, SOFAS_y), times = 3),
  cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex, 
)

text(
  labels = means_D3STEP[[1]]$param,
  x = D3STEP_forcont$xlim[[1]],
  y = c(SAPS_y, SANS_y, SOFAS_y),
  cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex,
  pos = 4
)


# #### Title & header
# par(font = 2)
# text(
#   labels = expression(paste(bold("Figure 4. "), "Forest plot for differences in distal outcomes at the end of the follow-up period (24 mths).")),
#   x = D3STEP_forcont$xlim[[1]],
#   y = D3STEP_forcont$ylim[[2]] + 0.5,
#   pos = 4,
#   cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex
# )

text(
  labels = "Estimated mean",
  x = median(D3STEP_forcont$ilab.xpos),
  y = D3STEP_forcont$ylim[[2]] - 1,
  cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex
)

text(
  labels = expression(bold("SMD [95% CI]"^1)),
  x = D3STEP_forcont$textpos[[2]] + 0.05,
  y = D3STEP_forcont$ylim[[2]] - 1,
  cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex, 
  pos = 2
)

#### Subtitle & subheader
par(font = 4)
text(
  labels = c("SAPS", "SANS", "SOFAS"),
  x = D3STEP_forcont$xlim[[1]],
  y = c(max(SAPS_y) + 1,
        max(SANS_y) + 1, 
        max(SOFAS_y) + 1),
  cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex, 
  pos = 4
)

text(
  labels = expression(italic("Stable-low"^"2"), italic("Fluctuating")),
  x = head(D3STEP_forcont$ilab.xpos, -1),
  y = max(SAPS_y) + 1,
  cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex
)

text(
  labels = expression(italic("Decreasing"), italic("Fluctuating"), italic("Stable-high")),
  x = D3STEP_forcont$ilab.xpos,
  y = max(SANS_y) + 1,
  cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex
)

text(
  labels = expression(italic("Increasing"^"2"), italic("Stable-moderate")),
  x = head(D3STEP_forcont$ilab.xpos, -1),
  y = max(SOFAS_y) + 1,
  cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex
)

# #### Footnote
# mtext(
#   text = expression(""^"2" ~ "Reference trajectory"),
#   side = 1,
#   line = 4,
#   at = D3STEP_forcont$xlim[[1]],
#   adj = 0,
#   cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex
# )
# 
# par(font = 1)
# mtext(
#   text = expression(""^"1" ~ "All results are statistically significant using a Bonferroni-corrected threshold (p < 0.001)."),
#   side = 1,
#   line = 5,
#   at = D3STEP_forcont$xlim[[1]],
#   adj = 0,
#   cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex
# )
# 
# par(font = 1)
# mtext(
#   text = paste(strwrap(
#     "CI: Confidence interval, EIS: Early intervention services, SANS: Scale for the assessment of negative symptoms, SAPS: Scale for the assessment of positive symptoms, SOFAS: Social occupational functioning scale, SMD: Standardized mean difference.",
#     width = 190
#   ), collapse = "\n"),
#   side = 1,
#   line = 7,
#   at = D3STEP_forcont$xlim[[1]],
#   adj = 0,
#   cex = D3STEP_forcont$cex
# )

dev.off()
```

#### Categorical variables (OR) 
```{r, include = FALSE} 
#### Plot
png(file.path(dir, "Figure4B_ForestPlot_D3STEP.png"), bg = "transparent", pointsize = 11, height = 15, width = 32.5, units = "cm", res = 600)
par(mar = c(bottom = 8, left = 0, top = 3, right = 0))

D3STEP_forcat <- forest.default(
  slab = D3STEP_df2[[2]]$param_diff,
  # ilab = cbind(means$mean_est1, means$mean_est2, means$mean_est3),
  ilab.xpos = seq(from = - 20, to = - 2.5, length.out = 3),
  x = D3STEP_df2[[2]]$OR_est,
  ci.lb = D3STEP_df2[[2]]$OR_low2.5,
  ci.ub = D3STEP_df2[[2]]$OR_up2.5,
  rows = c(
    seq(D3STEP_n[[2]]$SOFAS),
    6:7,
    seq(from = D3STEP_n[[2]]$SOFAS + D3STEP_n[[2]]$SANS + i * 2 + 1, length.out = D3STEP_n[[2]]$SAPS)
  ),
  xlim = c(-40, 50),
  alim = c(0, 40),
  ylim = c(0, sum(D3STEP_n[[2]]) + 10),
  refline = 1,
  psize = 1,
  cex = 1,
  xlab = expression(italic('Favor "worse" trajectory'), bold("Distal outcome"), italic('Favour "better" trajectory')),
  header = c("Distal outcomes", "OR [95% CI]"), 
  fonts = "Times New Roman"
)

#### Means
SAPS_y <- head(D3STEP_forcat$rows, D3STEP_n[[2]]$SAPS)
SOFAS_y <- tail(D3STEP_forcat$rows, D3STEP_n[[2]]$SOFAS)
SANS_y <- setdiff(D3STEP_forcat$rows, c(SOFAS_y, SAPS_y)) %>% 
  setdiff(seq(from = max(.) + 1, to = min(.)), .)

text(
  labels = c(means_D3STEP[[2]]$mean_est2, means_D3STEP[[2]]$mean_est1, means_D3STEP[[2]]$mean_est3),
  x = rep(D3STEP_forcat[["ilab.xpos"]], each = length(means_D3STEP[[2]]$mean_est1)),
  y = rep(c(SAPS_y, SANS_y, SOFAS_y), times = 3),
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex, 
)

text(
  labels = means_D3STEP[[2]]$param,
  x = D3STEP_forcat$xlim[[1]],
  y = rep(c(SAPS_y, SANS_y, SOFAS_y), times = 3),
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex,
  pos = 4
)

#### Title & header
par(font = 2)
text(
  labels = expression(paste(bold("Figure 4. "), "forest plot for distal outcomes at end of treatment.")),
  x = D3STEP_forcat$xlim[[1]],
  y = D3STEP_forcat$ylim[[2]],
  pos = 4,
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex
)

text(
  labels = "Estimated mean",
  x = median(D3STEP_forcat$ilab.xpos),
  y = D3STEP_forcat$ylim[[2]] - 1,
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex
)

#### Subtitle & subheader
par(font = 4)
text(
  labels = c("SAPS", "SANS", "SOFAS"),
  x = D3STEP_forcat$xlim[[1]],
  y = c(max(SAPS_y) + 1,
        max(SANS_y) + 1, 
        max(SOFAS_y) + 1),
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex, 
  pos = 4
)

text(
  labels = expression(italic("Increasing"^"1"), italic("Stable-moderate")),
  x = head(D3STEP_forcat$ilab.xpos, -1),
  y = max(SOFAS_y) + 1,
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex
)

text(
  labels = expression(italic("Stable-low"^"1"), italic("Fluctuating")),
  x = head(D3STEP_forcat$ilab.xpos, -1),
  y = max(SAPS_y) + 1,
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex
)

text(
  labels = expression(italic("Decreasing"), italic("Fluctuating"), italic("Stable-high")),
  x = D3STEP_forcat$ilab.xpos,
  y = max(SANS_y) + 1,
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex
)

#### Footnote
mtext(
  text = expression(""^"1" ~ "Reference trajectory"),
  side = 1,
  line = 4,
  at = D3STEP_forcat$xlim[[1]],
  adj = 0,
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex
)

par(font = 1)
mtext(
  text = expression(""^"2" ~ "All results are statistically significant with a Bonferroni-corrected threshold (p < 0.001)."),
  side = 1,
  line = 5,
  at = D3STEP_forcat$xlim[[1]],
  adj = 0,
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex
)

mtext(
  text = expression(""^"3" ~ "Binary categorical variable [0 = no, 1 = yes], a threshold value > 1 indicates a higher proportion of cases coded as yes."),
  side = 1,
  line = 6,
  at = D3STEP_forcat$xlim[[2]],
  adj = 0,
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex
)

par(font = 1)
mtext(
  text = paste(strwrap(
    "CI: Confidence interval, SANS: Scale for the assessment of negative symptoms, SAPS: Scale for the assessment of positive symptoms, SOFAS: Social occupational functioning scale, SMD: Standardized mean difference.",
    width = 170
  ), collapse = "\n"),
  side = 1,
  line = 7,
  at = D3STEP_forcat$xlim[[1]],
  adj = 0,
  cex = D3STEP_forcat$cex
)

dev.off()
```

![](/Users/olivierpercie/Desktop/MplusLGM/Results/D3STEP_ForestPlot.pdf)


### Supplementary Table 7.  ns results - D3STEP 
```{r}
D3STEP_ns <- D3STEP %>%
  modify_in("SOFAS.env", \(df) filter(df, !str_detect(param, "DIFF12"))) %>% 
  modify_in("SAPS.env", \(df) filter(df, !str_detect(param, "DIFF12"))) %>% 
  modify_in("SANS.env", \(df) filter(df, !str_detect(param, "DIFF12|DIFF32|DIFF31"))) %>% 
  map2(tail(env, -1), \(df, env) filter(df, WaldChiSq_PValue >= (0.05 / length(env$D3STEP_models)))) %>%
  # map(\(df) filter(df, !(paramHeader == "New.Additional.Parameters" & pval > 0.05))) %>% # only for SANS
  # map(\(df) filter(df, is.na(errors))) %>%
  map(\(df) select(df, -warnings, -errors)) %>%
  map(\(df) separate_wider_delim(df, cols = param, delim = " ", names = c("param", "diff"), too_few = "align_start"))
  # map(\(x) mutate(x, across(c("OR_est", "OR_low2.5", "OR_up2.5"), ~ transf.lnortod.logis(log(.x))))) %>%
  # map(\(x) mutate(x, x = coalesce(SMD_est, OR_est))) %>%
  # map(\(x) mutate(x, ci.lb = coalesce(SMD_low2.5, OR_low2.5))) %>%
  # map(\(x) mutate(x, ci.ub = coalesce(SMD_up2.5, OR_up2.5)))

D3STEP_cont_ns <- D3STEP_ns %>%
  map(\(df) filter(df, !str_detect(paramHeader, "Thresholds") & is.na(OR_est))) %>% 
  map(\(df) pivot_wider(df, names_from = LatentClass, names_glue = "mean_est{LatentClass}", values_from = est)) %>%
  map(\(df) reframe(df, .by = param, across(c(diff, SMD_est, SMD_low2.5, SMD_up2.5, WaldChiSq_PValue, matches("mean_est\\d")), ~ na.omit(unique(.))))) %>%
  imap(\(df, idx) mutate(df, outcome = str_remove(idx, ".env"))) %>% 
  reduce(~ merge(.x, .y, all = TRUE)) %>% 
  group_by(outcome) %>%
  arrange(outcome, SMD_est, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(ifelse(outcome == "SANS", c(param, SMD_est), NA))
  write_xlsx(path = glue(getwd(), 'results', 'D3STEP_{today()}.xlsx', .sep = '/'))
  
D3STEP_cat_ns <- D3STEP_ns %>%
  map(\(df) filter(df, !str_detect(paramHeader, "Means") & is.na(SMD_est))) %>% 
  map(\(df) pivot_wider(df, names_from = LatentClass, names_glue = "mean_est{LatentClass}", values_from = est)) %>%
  map(\(df) mutate(df, param = str_remove(param, regex("\\$\\d")))) %>%
  map(\(df) reframe(df, .by = param, across(c(diff, OR_est, OR_low2.5, OR_up2.5, matches("mean_est\\d")), ~ na.omit(unique(.))))) %>%
  imap(\(df, idx) mutate(df, outcome = str_remove(idx, ".env"))) %>% 
  reduce(~ merge(.x, .y, all = TRUE)) %>% 
  group_by(outcome) %>%
  arrange(outcome, OR_est, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(ifelse(outcome == "SANS", c(param, OR_est), NA))

D3STEP_ns2 <- list(D3STEP_cont_ns, D3STEP_cat_ns) %>% 
  map(\(df) mutate(df, across(starts_with("mean"), ~ as.numeric(.x)))) %>%
  map(\(df) mutate(df, across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 2)))) %>%
  map(\(df) mutate(df, across(ends_with(c("est", "low2.5", "up2.5")), ~ case_when(. > 100 ~ 50, .default = .)))) %>%
  # map(\(df) filter(df, if_any(ends_with("est"), ~ !is.infinite(.)))) %>% ######### REMOVE INFNITE ORs FROM FOREST PLOT 
  map(\(df) select(df, outcome, everything())) %>%
  map(\(df) mutate(df, diff_lbl = case_when(
    outcome == "SOFAS" & diff == "DIFF12" ~ "    MS vs. SS",
    outcome == "SAPS" & diff == "DIFF12" ~ "    LD vs. HD",
    outcome == "SANS" & diff == "DIFF21" ~ "    D vs. F",
    outcome == "SANS" & diff == "DIFF23" ~ "    D vs. P",
    outcome == "SANS" & diff == "DIFF13" ~ "    F vs. P",
    .default = NA
    ))) %>% 
  map(\(df) var_to_lbl(df, param)) %>% 
  map(\(df) mutate(df, param_diff = case_when(outcome == 'SANS' ~ diff_lbl, .default = param)))

```


## Supplementary Tables 8. Sensitivity analysis 
```{r} 
summary_tbl_SA <- list(
                       pluck(env[[2]], "FINAL_fit_458"), 
                       pluck(env[[3]], "FINAL_fit_456"),
                       pluck(env[[4]], "FINAL_fit_460") 
  ) %>% 
  bind_rows() %>% 
  mutate(Outcome = c("SOFAS", "SAPS", "SANS")) %>%
  rename(N = Observations) %>%
  rename("Latent classes" = NLatentClasses) %>%
  mutate(Model = c("GBTM", "GMM (class-variant)", "GMM (class-invariant)")) %>%
  mutate(Polynomial = c("quadratic", "cubic", "cubic (1, 2); linear (3)")) %>%
  mutate("Random effect" = c("0", "intercept & linear slope", "intercept & linear slope")) %>%
  mutate(Residuals = c("fix across time & classes", "free across time & classes", "free across classes")) %>%
  # mutate("aLMR pval" = round(T11_LMR_PValue, 3)) %>%
  mutate("aLMR pval" = "< 0.001") %>%
  mutate(across(c(where(is.numeric), -T11_LMR_PValue), ~ round(.x, 2))) %>%
  mutate("Class 1" = glue("{count_1} ({round(proportion_1, 0)}%)")) %>%
  mutate("Class 2" = glue("{count_2} ({round(proportion_2, 0)}%)")) %>%
  mutate("Class 3" = case_when(!is.na(count_3) ~ glue("{count_3} ({round(proportion_3, 0)}%)"))) %>%
  select("Outcome", "N", "Latent classes", "Model", "Parameters", "Polynomial", "Random effect", "Residuals", "BIC", "aLMR pval",
starts_with("Class"), "Entropy")
  # data_edit(code = TRUE, viewer = "dialog")

set_flextable_defaults(font.family = "Times New Roman", font.size = 7, big.mark = "")

summary_tbl_SA %>% 
  flextable() %>% 
  set_caption(caption = as_paragraph(as_b("Table 2. "), "Summary of optimal models."), align_with_table = FALSE, 
              fp_p = fp_par(text.align = "left")) %>% 
  padding(padding = 0, part = "all") %>% 
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 1) %>% 
  bold(part = 'header') %>% 
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>% 
  add_footer_lines(values = "aLMR: Adjusted Lo-Mendell-Rubin likelihood ratio test, BIC: Baeysian information criterion, GBTM: Group-based trajectory model, GMM: Growth mixture model, SANS: Scale for the assessment of negative symptoms, SAPS: Scale for the assessment of positive symptoms, SOFAS: Social occupational functioning scale.") %>% 
  autofit(add_w = 0, add_h = 0) %>%
  save_as_docx(path = file.path(dir, "SupplementaryTable6_sensitivity_analysis.docx"),
               pr_section = prop_section(page_size = page_size(orient = "portrait"),
                                         type = "continuous",
                                         page_margins = page_mar(1, 1, 0.5, 0.5)))
```

# Poster 
```{r}
dir <- "/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1.PEPP2/Meetings & conferences/SIRS/2024"
```

## Traj plots 
```{r} 
plots <- map(env, \(env) pluck(env, "plot")) %>% compact()

plots$SAPS.env <- plots$SAPS.env +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Class", labels = c("Fluctuating (68%)", "Stable-low (32%)"),
                     values = c("#E78E5E", "#7DA79D")) +
  scale_linetype_discrete(name = "Class", labels = c("Fluctuating (68%)", "Stable-low (32%)")) +
  scale_shape_discrete(name = "Class", labels = c("Fluctuating (68%)", "Stable-low (32%)")) +
```
