```{r} 
  labs(title = bquote(bold("Trajectories of positive symptoms")), x = "Time (mths)", y = "SAPS")

plots$SANS.env <- plots$SANS.env +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Class", labels = c("Fluctuating (15%)", "Decreasing (41%)", "Stable-high (44%)"),
                     values = c("#006EC6", "#7DA79D", "#E78E5E")) +
  scale_linetype_discrete(name = "Class", labels = c("Fluctuating (15%)", "Decreasing (41%)", "Stable-high (44%)")) +
  scale_shape_discrete(name = "Class", labels = c("Fluctuating (15%)", "Decreasing (41%)", "Stable-high (44%)")) +
  labs(title = bquote(bold("Trajectories of negative symptoms")), x = "Time (mths)", y = "SANS")

plots$SOFAS.env <- plots$SOFAS.env +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Class", labels = c("Stable-moderate (43%)", "Increasing (57%)"), 
                     values = c("#E78E5E", "#7DA79D")) +
  scale_linetype_discrete(name = "Class", labels = c("Stable-moderate (43%)", "Increasing (57%)")) +
  scale_shape_discrete(name = "Class", labels = c("Stable-moderate (43%)", "Increasing (57%)")) +
  labs(title = bquote(bold("Trajectories of social and occupational functioning")), x = "Time (mths)", y = "SOFAS")

traj_plot <- (plots$SAPS.env / plots$SANS.env / plots$SOFAS.env) &
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, family = "Arial", color = "#453E3F"), 
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent', color = NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill='transparent', color = NA),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill= "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill= "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.position = c(1, 1),
        legend.title=element_blank(),
        legend.justification = c(1, 1),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 15))

# traj_plot <- traj_plot + 
#   plot_annotation(
#     title = bquote(bold("Figure 1.") ~ "Estimated latent trajectories of outcome over 2-year early intervention services."),
#     caption = "Observed individuals trajectories are plotted in the background.",
#     theme = theme(text = element_text(size = 13, family = "Arial"),
#                   plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 13)
#                   )
#     )

# extrafont::loadfonts()

ggsave(traj_plot, filename = file.path(dir, "Figure1_Trajectories.png"), height = 45, width = 40, units = "cm", dpi = 600, bg='transparent')
```
## Circle plots 
```{r} 
png(file.path(dir, "Figure2_CirclePlot.png"), bg = 'transparent', height = 75, width = 30, units = 'cm', res = 600)

par(family = "Arial", col= "#453E3F", adj = 0.5, mfrow = c(1, 3),
    mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0), 
    mai = c(0, 0, 0, 0), 
    oma = c(0, 0, 0, 0))

layout <- layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3), 3, 1, byrow = TRUE))
# layout.show(layout)

circos.clear()  
circos.par(start.degree = 90)
```

### SAPS/SOFAS 
```{r} 
par(ps = 45)
.circle1 <- chordDiagram(select(circle_df1, 1:3),
              order = c("Stable-moderate", "Increasing", "Stable-low", "Fluctuating"),
              grid.col = c('Fluctuating' = '#E78E5E', 
                          'Stable-low' = '#7DA79D', 
                          'Stable-moderate' = 'grey',
                          'Increasing' = 'grey'),
             annotationTrack = c('grid', 'name'),
             annotationTrackHeight = c(0.03, 0.01))

par(ps = 30)
highlight.sector(
  text = "Positive symptoms trajectories",
  sector.index = tail(get.all.sector.index(), 2), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.5,
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

highlight.sector(
  text = "Functioning trajectories",
  sector.index = head(get.all.sector.index(), 2), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.5,
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

pwalk(list(.circle1$rn, .circle1$x1, .circle1$value1, circle_df1$SAPS_n_pct),  
    \(rn, x1, v1, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"), 
            x = x1 - v1 + v1/2, y = -20, 
            sector.index = rn, track.index = 1, 
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 20, cex = 1.25))

pwalk(list(.circle1$cn, .circle1$x2, .circle1$value2, circle_df1$SOFAS_n_pct),  
    \(cn, x2, v2, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"), 
            x = x2 - v2 + v2/2, y = -20, 
            sector.index = cn, track.index = 1, 
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 20, cex = 1.25))
```

### SANS/SOFAS 
```{r} 
par(ps = 45)
.circle2 <- chordDiagram(select(circle_df2, 1:3),
             order = c('Stable-moderate', 'Increasing', 'Decreasing', 'Fluctuating',  'Stable-high'),
              grid.col = c('Decreasing' = '#7DA79D', 
                          'Fluctuating' = '#3F8AC4', 
                          'Stable-high' = '#E78E5E',
                          'Stable-moderate' = 'grey',
                          'Increasing' = 'grey'),
             annotationTrack = c('grid', 'name'),
             annotationTrackHeight = c(0.03, 0.01))

par(ps = 30)
highlight.sector(
  text = "Negative symptoms trajectories",
  sector.index = tail(get.all.sector.index(), 3), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.5,
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

highlight.sector(
  text = "Functioning trajectories",
  sector.index = head(get.all.sector.index(), 2), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.5,
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

pwalk(list(.circle2$rn, .circle2$x1, .circle2$value1, circle_df2$SANS_n_pct),  
    \(rn, x1, v1, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"), 
            x = x1 - v1 + v1/2, y = -20, 
            sector.index = rn, track.index = 1, 
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 20, cex = 1.25))

pwalk(list(.circle2$cn, .circle2$x2, .circle2$value2, circle_df2$SOFAS_n_pct),  
    \(cn, x2, v2, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"),
            x = x2 - v2 + v2/2, y = -20, 
            sector.index = cn, track.index = 1, 
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 20, cex = 1.25))
```

### SAPS/SANS 
```{r} 
par(ps = 45)
.circle3 <- chordDiagram(select(circle_df3, c(C_SAPS, C_SANS, count)),
             order = c('Decreasing', 'Fluctuating', 'Stable-high', 'Fluctuating', 'Stable-low'),
             grid.col = c(
                          'Decreasing' = 'grey',
                          'Fluctuating' = 'grey',
                          'Stable-high' = 'grey',
                          'Fluctuating' = '#E78E5E',
                          'Stable-low' = '#7DA79D'
                          ),
             annotationTrack = c('grid', 'name'),
             annotationTrackHeight = c(0.03, 0.01))

par(ps = 30)
highlight.sector(
  text = "Negative symptoms trajectories",
  sector.index = head(get.all.sector.index(), 3), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.5, 
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

highlight.sector(
  text = "Positive symptoms trajectories",
  sector.index = tail(get.all.sector.index(), 2), track.index = 1,
  text.vjust = 4,
  font = 2, col = NA, cex = 1.5,
  facing = "bending.outside", niceFacing = TRUE
)

pwalk(list(.circle3$rn, .circle3$x1, .circle3$value1, circle_df3$SANS_n_pct),  
    \(rn, x1, v1, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"), 
            x = x1 - v1 + v1/2, y = -20, 
            sector.index = rn, track.index = 1, 
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 20, cex =1.25))

pwalk(list(.circle3$cn, .circle3$x2, .circle3$value2, circle_df3$SAPS_n_pct),  
    \(cn, x2, v2, pct) circos.text(labels = glue("{pct}%"), 
            x = x2 - v2 + v2/2, y = -20, 
            sector.index = cn, track.index = 1, 
            facing = "clockwise", niceFacing = TRUE, ps = 20, cex =1.25))

dev.off()
```


## Forest plots 
### R3STEP 
```{r}
png(file.path(dir, "Figure3_ForestPlotR3STEP.png"), bg = "transparent", height = 50, width = 65, units = "cm", res = 600, pointsize = 20)
par(mar = c(bottom = 3, left = 0, top = 0, right = 0), col= "#453E3F")

R3STEP_forestp <- forest.default(
  slab = R3STEP_df$param,
  # ilab = cbind(R3STEP_df$`mean_est2`, R3STEP_df$`mean_est1`, R3STEP_df$`mean_est3`),
  # ilab.xpos = seq(from = -2, to = -0.5, length.out = 3),
  x = log(R3STEP_df$OR_est),
  ci.lb = log(R3STEP_df$OR_low2.5),
  ci.ub = log(R3STEP_df$OR_up2.5),
  rows = c(
    seq(R3STEP_n$SOFAS),
    seq(from = R3STEP_n$SOFAS + i, length.out = R3STEP_n$SANS),
    seq(from = R3STEP_n$SOFAS + R3STEP_n$SANS + 2 * i -1, length.out = R3STEP_n$SAPS)
  ),
  # alim = c(-10, 10),
  xlim = c(-5, 5.5),
  at = c(-1.5, 0, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5),
  ylim = c(0, R3STEP_n$SANS + R3STEP_n$SAPS + R3STEP_n$SOFAS + 3 * i),
  refline = 0,
  efac = c(0, 0),
  pch = 19, 
  psize = 1, #R3STEP_df$OR_est
  lwd = 5, 
  # col = c(rep("#006EC6", 3), rep("#7DA79D", 17)),
  cex = 2,
  top = 4,
  xlab = expression(italic('Favours "worse" trajectory'), italic('Favours "better" trajectory')),
  header = c("Baseline predictors of trajectory membership", "Log OR [95% CI]"), 
  fonts = "Arial", 
  col= "#453E3F"
)

#### Subtitle & subheader
par(font = 4)
text(
  labels = c("SAPS", "SANS", "SOFAS"),
  x = R3STEP_forestp$xlim[[1]],
  y = c(
    max(R3STEP_forestp$rows) + 1,
    R3STEP_n$SOFAS + R3STEP_n$SANS + i,
    R3STEP_n$SOFAS + 1
  ),
  pos = 4,
  cex = R3STEP_forestp$cex, 
  col= "#453E3F"
)

dev.off()

```

### D3STEP 
```{r}
png(file.path(dir, "Figure4A_ForestPlot_D3STEP.png"), bg = "transparent", pointsize = 20, height = 50, width = 65, units = "cm", res = 600)
par(mar = c(bottom = 4, left = 0, top = 0, right = 0), col= "#453E3F")

D3STEP_forcontp <- forest.default(
  slab = D3STEP_df2[[1]]$param_diff,
  # ilab = cbind(means$mean_est1, means$mean_est2, means$mean_est3),
  # ilab.xpos = seq(from = -7, to = -3.5, length.out = 3),
  x = D3STEP_df2[[1]]$SMD_est,
  ci.lb = D3STEP_df2[[1]]$SMD_low2.5,
  ci.ub = D3STEP_df2[[1]]$SMD_up2.5,
  rows = c(
    seq(D3STEP_n[[1]]$SOFAS),
    c(9:11, 13:15, 17),
    seq(from = 18 + i, length.out = D3STEP_n[[1]]$SAPS)
  ),
  xlim = c(-5, 5),
  alim = c(-2.5, 2.5),
  ylim = c(0, 24 + 4),
  refline = 0,
  efac = c(0, 0),
  pch = 19, 
  psize = 1,
  lwd = 5, 
  cex = 2,
  xlab = expression(italic('Higher in "worse" trajectory'), italic('Higher in "better" trajectory')),
  header = c("Distal outcomes differences at end of EIS", "SMD [95% CI]"), 
  fonts = "Arial", 
  col= "#453E3F"
)

SAPS_y <- head(D3STEP_forcontp$rows, c(D3STEP_n[[1]]$SAPS))
SOFAS_y <- tail(D3STEP_forcontp$rows, c(D3STEP_n[[1]]$SOFAS))

# SANS_y <- max(setdiff(D3STEP_forcontp$rows, c(SAPS_y, SOFAS_y))) + 1

text(
  labels = means[[1]]$param,
  x = D3STEP_forcontp$xlim[[1]],
  y = c(SAPS_y, 18, 16, 12, SOFAS_y),
  cex = D3STEP_forcontp$cex,
  pos = 4
)

#### Subtitle & subheader
par(font = 4)
text(
  labels = c("SAPS", "SANS", "SOFAS"),
  x = D3STEP_forcontp$xlim[[1]],
  y = c(max(D3STEP_forcontp$rows) + 1, 
        max(tail(D3STEP_forcontp$rows, D3STEP_n[[1]]$SANS)) + i + D3STEP_n[[1]]$SOFAS + 1, 
        max(tail(D3STEP_forcontp$rows, D3STEP_n[[1]]$SOFAS)) + 1),
  cex = D3STEP_forcontp$cex, 
  pos = 4
)

dev.off()
```


# Save 
```{r} 
save.image(file.path(getwd(), 'Results', 'Results_689.RData'))
```
